object.script:
S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTx=S.drawText I=input O=output oB=O.setBool tU=table.unpack T=true F=false tbh=0 asd=6 ax=asd axf=false function cp(s)C(243,243,243) if s=="w1" then C(146,160,169)end if s==1 then C(125,125,125)end if s==2 then C(75,75,75)end if s==3 then C(25,25,25)end if s==4 then C(15,15,15)end if s=="r" then C(150,0,0)end if s=="y" then C(125,125,0)end if s=="g" then C(0,50,0)end if s=="be" then C(0,19,150)end if s=="be2" then C(0,38,65)end if s=="cy" then C(0,85,85)end if s=="bk" then C(0,0,0)end if s=="o" then C(185,39,0)end end function iS(rX,rY,rU)return iR(rX,rY,rU,rU)end function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function gB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function dS(x,y,w,h)dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2
cp()dS(cw-8,ch-8,16,16) ca(cw-8,ch-8) cp()dTx(cw+9,ch+8-5,"Gimbal")
end
function ca(x,y)cp(4)dS(x+2,y+3,12,10)dF(x+4,y+2,2,1)cp(2)dF(x+3,y+4,10,3)cp(3)dF(x+3,y+7,10,5)cp() dCF(x+7.5,y+7.5,3.1)cp("be2")dCF(x+7.5,y+7.5,2.1)end

node.label: Input
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
s=string M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTx=S.drawText dL=S.drawLine dTxB=S.drawTextBox dCF=S.drawCircleF I=input tU=table.unpack F=string.format
function dS(x,y,w,h)dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h
C(243,243,243)dF(0,0,w,h) C(25,25,25)logo(cw-22-7,ch-4)
end
function logo(x,y) x=x-2 y=y-1 dF(x+2,y+1,1,3)dF(x+3,y+2,1,3)dF(x+6,y+1,1,3)dF(x+5,y+2,1,3)dF(x+3,y+3,4,1)dS(x+2,y+4,5,4)dF(x+10,y+4,1,4)d(x+11,y+5)dF(x+12,y+4,2,1)dF(x+15,y+5,3,1)dF(x+15,y+5,1,3)dF(x+15,y+7,2,1)dF(x+17,y+5,1,2)d(x+18,y+7)dF(x+20,y+2,1,6)d(x+21,y+5)d(x+21,y+7)d(x+22,y+6)dF(x+24,y+2,1,6)d(x+25,y+5)d(x+25,y+7)d(x+26,y+6)dF(x+28,y+6,1,2)d(x+28,y+4)dF(x+30,y+4,3,1)dF(x+31,y+2,1,6)dF(x+36,y+3,1,4)dF(x+37,y+2,3,1)dF(x+37,y+7,3,1)dF(x+40,y+3,1,4)dF(x+43,y+2,3,1)d(x+42,y+3)d(x+43,y+4)d(x+44,y+5)d(x+45,y+6)dF(x+42,y+7,3,1)dTx(x+48,y-1,"PRO")C(150,0,0)dF(x+2,y+10,11,1)C(0,50,0)dF(x+2+11,y+10,11,1)C(0,38,255)dF(x+2+11*2,y+10,11,1)C(75,75,0)dF(x+2+11*3,y+10,11,1)end

microprocessor_definition.name: D1 Module (System Data) - Rabbit OS Pro

node.label: D1 Module (System Data) - Out
node.description: Connect to main board: D1
Main Note

object.script:
igN = input.getNumber osN = output.setNumber igB = input.getBool osB = output.setBool ssC = screen.setColor sdL = screen.drawLine sdC = screen.drawCircle sdR = screen.drawRect sdTF = screen.drawTriangleF sdRF= screen.drawRectF sdCF = screen.drawCircleF sdT = screen.drawText stf = string.format sts = string.sub
p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6,p7,p8=0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0
function onTick() bar_1 = igB(1) or igB(2) or igB(3) bar_2 = igB(4) or igB(5) or igB(6) bar_3 = igB(7) or igB(8) or igB(9) bar_4 = igB(10) or igB(11) or igB(12) bar_5 = igB(13) or igB(14) or igB(15) bar_6 = igB(16) or igB(17) or igB(18) bar_7 = igB(19) or igB(20) or igB(21) bar_8 = igB(22) or igB(23) or igB(24) or igB(25)
position = (igN(1)/igN(2))*18 if igB(32) == true then if bar_1 == true then p1 = 5 end if bar_2 == true then p2 = 5 end if bar_3 == true then p3 = 5 end if bar_4 == true then p4 = 5 end if bar_5 == true then p5 = 5 end if bar_6 == true then p6 = 5 end if bar_7 == true then p7 = 5 end if bar_8 == true then p8 = 5 end end
if p1 >= 0 then p1=p1-0.1 end if p2 >= 0 then p2=p2-0.1 end if p3 >= 0 then p3=p3-0.1 end if p4 >= 0 then p4=p4-0.1 end if p5 >= 0 then p5=p5-0.1 end if p6 >= 0 then p6=p6-0.1 end if p7 >= 0 then p7=p7-0.1 end if p8 >= 0 then p8=p8-0.1 end end
function soundbar(x,y,power) if 1 <= power then ssC(150,0,0) sdL(x,y,x+4,y) end if 2 <= power then ssC(150,0,0) sdL(x,y-2,x+4,y-2) end if 3 <= power then ssC(150,150,0) sdL(x,y-4,x+4,y-4) end if 4 <= power then ssC(0,150,0) sdL(x,y-6,x+4,y-6) end end
function onDraw() soundbar(32,24,p1) soundbar(32+5*1,24,p2) soundbar(32+5*2,24,p3) soundbar(32+5*3,24,p4) soundbar(32+5*4,24,p5) soundbar(32+5*5,24,p6) soundbar(32+5*6,24,p7) soundbar(32+5*7,24,p8) ssC(50,50,50) sdL(72,21,91,21) ssC(255,255,255) sdL(72,19,72,24) sdL(90,19,90,24) sdL(80,19,80,24) sdL(85,19,85,24) sdRF(72,20,position,3) end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen --yyy-- function a(b) c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1]) c=c+1 end c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1]) c=c+1 end g={} h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";" ) while j do g[h]={} k=e.sub(b,i+1,j) l=1 m=0 while m< e.len(k)do n=e.sub(k,m+1,m+1) o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8) if not(o==";" )then c=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,1,2)) q=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,3,4)) r=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,5,6)) s=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,7,8)) if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={}g[h][l][1]=c g[h][l][2]=q g[h][l][3]=r g[h][l][4]=s end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end i=j j=e.find(b,";" ,j+1) h=h+1 end return g end t=0.4 function u(v,w,c,q,r,s) if not c then c=0 end if not q then q=0 end if not r then r=0 end if not s then s=0 end x.setColor(c*t,q*t,r*t,s) x.drawRectF(v-1,w-1,1,1) end
TT=false
Tx,Ty=1,8 y=32 z=0 E=0 Tim=0 Lim=240
function onTick() ON = input.getBool(1) if ON == false then Tim=0 Change = false else if Tim<Lim then Tim=Tim+1 Change = false elseif Tim==Lim then Change = true end end
if Tim>1 then Turnon=true else Turnon=false end
if Tim<Lim/2 then E=2*Tim/Lim TT=false else E=1 TT=true end
if E == 1 then if y > 14 then y=y-0.75 elseif y>12 then y=y-0.125 elseif y <= 10 then y=y end if Tx<44 then Tx=Tx+1.25 elseif Tx<46 then Tx=Tx+0.125 elseif Tx>=50 then Tx=Tx end else y=32 Tx=0 end
output.setBool(1,Change) output.setBool(2,Turnon) end
function onDraw() A=x.getWidth() B=x.getHeight() x.setColor(0,0,0) x.drawClear() x.setColor(20,20,20) if TT==true then x.drawText(Tx+1, Ty+1, "FAULDS") x.drawText(Tx+2, Ty+9, "INDUSTRY") x.setColor(255,255,255) x.drawText(Tx, Ty,"FAULDS") x.drawText(Tx+1, Ty+8,"INDUSTRY") end x.setColor(0,0,0) x.drawRectF(0,0,40,32)
if not C then return end
k=1 while not(C[k]==nil)do o=1 while not(C[k][o]==nil)do if not C[k][o]==false then u(y+o,z+D-1+k,C[k][o][1],C[k][o][2],C[k][o][3],C[k][o][4]*E) end o=o+1 end k=k+1 end end
D=1 f={{"000000","I"},{"ggggg","H"},{"gggggggggg","G"},{"wwwww","V"},{"wwwwwwwwww","W"},{"xxx","Z"},{"xxxxx","Y"},{"xxxxxxxxxx","X"},{"ffffffff","g"},{"000000ff","w"},{"00000000","x"}} H="F;F;XXxmYxx;Y###Xxx#qqqYZ;Y##q#Xx##qqYZ;Zx#qqq##Yxx~05:m#Yxx;Zx#qqm#xx~,n05:##Yxx;Zmmn,kO~,Jxx;Zm#~R-:O~RO1f0Rr:O~,Y;ZK,krf~R-:O1f0,Y;LO1f0RzO~ROJ;L-:O~RrfJ;ZKRO~,krfJ;Zssn,k-:O~,~,n,Y;xxsss~,n,pf=f=f~,n05:Z;xsss##n05:pf=:zzOpf=f=fn,x;xssj!#1f0,p:z-:BvA-:B:pfY;xsj!jf5:#=f=:zAB_kzovB:=f=fY;D=:zovzkylNy:=:OY;DkzB_IkNy:00-:evNc:=:OY;P!#kzkc:IkIkt:e:evylUc_=:OY;P!SUc_k-:OY;Tf5:TM;xj!jM;xj!j!#kz-vc_00-vQclY;xm#kz-vQy_e:c:Zx;Zp:z-vEevc:PCe:c_Zx;Zp:zzkEkPf5ljCY;Z=fxkzz-vy_e:y_Zj!Y;YxkzzOxkovovB:XY;F;F;;" d={{"z-:ovz","A"},{"af8","B"},{"f5:jf5_","C"},{"usu6f6!#","D"},{"ylIevc:I","E"},{"XXXxx","F"},{"~05:Y","J"},{"##nRrf1f0","K"},{"Z##~,kOnR","L"},{"!StvyvOYx","M"},{"IkIkIev","N"},{"uuu6f6","P"},{"-f","O"},{"y_e:y_e:","Q"},{"05v","R"},{"#kzkc_Uyl","S"},{"6f6f5:6f6","T"},{"tf00-v","U"},{"5f5","j"},{"ef","k"},{":e:c:","l"},{"####","m"},{"~,1f0","n"},{"=f=f=","p"},{"af8vaf8","o"},{"1f1f1:","q"},{"-f1f0,ef-","r"},{"bfbfb:","s"},{"00-f00-","t"},{"9faf7:","u"},{":ef","v"},{"c_e:c","y"},{"-:-:","z"},{"f5:5f5f5:","!"},{"cf6f00e","="},{"1f0,1f0","~"},{"2f2f2:","#"},{"8f00e","-"},{":e:c:e:c:","_"},{"05:1f005:",","},{"fef",":"}} C=a(H)

igN = input.getNumber osN = output.setNumber igB = input.getBool osB = output.setBool ssC = screen.setColor sdL = screen.drawLine sdC = screen.drawCircle sdR = screen.drawRect sdTF = screen.drawTriangleF sdRF= screen.drawRectF sdCF = screen.drawCircleF sdT = screen.drawText stf = string.format sts = string.sub font34={ 0x0D0,0xC0C,0xFAF,0x2F4,0xB2D,0x6F5,0x0C0,0x690,0x096,0xAEA,0x4E4,0x560,0x444,0x010,0x168,0x79E,0x5F1, 0x9B5,0x9DA,0x6F2,0xDDA,0x6DA,0x9AC,0x3FC,0x4A7,0x050,0x1A0,0x44A,0xAAA,0xA44,0xA41,0x69D,0x7A7,0xFD6, 0x699,0xF96,0xFD9,0xFA8,0x69B,0xF2F,0x9F9,0x19E,0xF4B,0xF11,0xF4F,0xF6F,0x696,0xFA4,0x6B7,0xFA5,0x5BA, 0x8F8,0xE1E,0xC3C,0xF5F,0x969,0xC7C,0xBD9,0xF90,0x861,0x09F,0x484,0x111,0x084,0x2F9,0x0F0,0x9F4,0x462}
function dDot(x,y) screen.drawLine(x,y,x,y+1) end
function dChar(x,y,char) c=string.byte(string.upper(char))-32 if c>64 then c=c-26 end if c>0 and c<69 then for i=0,11 do if font34[c]&(1<<(11-i))>0 then dDot(x+i//4, y+i%4) end end end end
function dStr(x,y,str) cs=string.len(str) for i=0,cs-1 do dChar(x+4*i,y,string.sub(str,i+1,i+1)) end end
function onTick() stop,pause = igB(2),igB(3) end
function onDraw() ssC(0,0,0) sdRF(0,0,32,32) sdRF(91,0,5,32) sdRF(0,0,96,4) sdRF(0,28,96,4) ssC(5,5,5) sdRF(1,1,30,30) sdRF(92,1,3,30) sdRF(1,1,94,3) sdRF(1,28,94,3) ssC(255,255,255) sdL(32,26,91,26) if stop == true then dStr(32,5,'STOP') elseif pause == true then dStr(32,5,'PAUSE') else dStr(32,5,'NOW PLAYING ...') end ssC(7,7,7) dStr(4,24,'FAULDS') ssC(3,3,3) dStr(4,23,'FAULDS') end

igN = input.getNumber osN = output.setNumber igB = input.getBool osB = output.setBool ssC = screen.setColor sdL = screen.drawLine sdC = screen.drawCircle sdR = screen.drawRect sdTF = screen.drawTriangleF sdRF= screen.drawRectF sdCF = screen.drawCircleF sdT = screen.drawText stf = string.format sts = string.sub
function Within(x, y, rectX, rectY, rectW, rectH) return x > rectX and y > rectY and x < rectX+rectW and y < rectY+rectH end
function button(x,y,w,h,p) if p == true then ssC(30,30,30) sdL(x,y,x+w-1,y) sdL(x,y,x,y+h-1) ssC(70,70,70) sdL(x+w-1,y+1,x+w-1,y+h) sdL(x+1,y+h-1,x+w-1,y+h-1) else ssC(70,70,70) sdL(x,y,x+w-1,y) sdL(x,y,x,y+h-1) ssC(30,30,30) sdL(x+w-1,y+1,x+w-1,y+h) sdL(x+1,y+h-1,x+w-1,y+h-1) end end
function highlight(x,y,w,h,p) if p == true then ssC(7,7,7) sdL(x,y,x+w-1,y) sdL(x,y,x,y+h-1) ssC(3,3,3) sdL(x+w-1,y+1,x+w-1,y+h) sdL(x+1,y+h-1,x+w-1,y+h-1) else ssC(3,3,3) sdL(x,y,x+w-1,y) sdL(x,y,x,y+h-1) ssC(7,7,7) sdL(x+w-1,y+1,x+w-1,y+h) sdL(x+1,y+h-1,x+w-1,y+h-1) end end
stop,play,pause = false,false,false PrevX,PrevY = 2,3 NextX,NextY = 16,3 WNP,HNP = 13,8 PauseX,PauseY = 2,12 StopX,StopY = 11,12 PlayX,PlayY = 20,12 WPSP,HPSP = 8,8
function onTick() X,Y,P = igN(3),igN(4),igB(1)
Next = (P and Within(X, Y, NextX,NextY,WNP,HNP)) Prev = (P and Within(X, Y, PrevX,PrevY,WNP,HNP)) stop = (P and Within(X, Y, StopX,StopY,WPSP,HPSP)) pause = (P and Within(X, Y, PauseX,PauseY,WPSP,HPSP)) play = (P and Within(X, Y, PlayX,PlayY,WPSP+1,HPSP))
osB(5, stop) osB(6, pause) osB(7, play) osB(3,Next) osB(4,Prev)
end
function onDraw() ssC(50,50,50) sdRF(PrevX,PrevY,WNP,HNP) sdRF(NextX,NextY,WNP,HNP) sdRF(PauseX,PauseY,WPSP,HPSP) sdRF(StopX,StopY,WPSP,HPSP) sdRF(PlayX,PlayY,WPSP+1,HPSP) button(PrevX,PrevY,WNP,HNP,Prev) button(NextX,NextY,WNP,HNP,Next) button(PauseX,PauseY,WPSP,HPSP,pause) button(StopX,StopY,WPSP,HPSP,stop) button(PlayX,PlayY,WPSP+1,HPSP,play) if Next == false then ssC(30,30,30) else ssC(255,255,255) end sdTF(NextX+2,NextY+2,NextX+7,NextY+6,NextX+2,NextY+6) sdTF(NextX+6,NextY+2,NextX+11,NextY+6,NextX+6,NextY+6) if Prev == false then ssC(30,30,30) else ssC(255,255,255) end sdTF(PrevX+2,PrevY+6,PrevX+7,PrevY+2,PrevX+7,PrevY+6) sdL(PrevX+3,PrevY+4,PrevX+6,PrevY+1) sdTF(PrevX+6,PrevY+6,PrevX+11,PrevY+2,PrevX+11,PrevY+6) sdL(PrevX+7,PrevY+4,PrevX+10,PrevY+1) if stop == false then ssC(30,30,30) else ssC(150,0,0) end sdRF(StopX+2,StopY+2,WPSP-4,HPSP-4) if pause == false then ssC(30,30,30) else ssC(100,40,10) end sdRF(PauseX+2,PauseY+2,1,HPSP-4) sdRF(PauseX+5,PauseY+2,1,HPSP-4) if play == false then ssC(30,30,30) else ssC(0,150,0) end sdRF(PlayX+2,PlayY+2,3,4) sdRF(PlayX+2,PlayY+3,5,2)
highlight(0,0,96,32,true) highlight(30,3,62,26,false) end

igN = input.getNumber osN = output.setNumber igB = input.getBool osB = output.setBool ssC = screen.setColor sdL = screen.drawLine sdC = screen.drawCircle sdR = screen.drawRect sdTF = screen.drawTriangleF sdRF= screen.drawRectF sdCF = screen.drawCircleF sdT = screen.drawText stf = string.format sts = string.sub
x,y,i=32,12,0
function onTick() change,songnum = igB(1),igN(32) if change == true then x,y=32,12 i=0 end if 120 <= i then x = x-0.2 i = 121 elseif 0<=i then i = i+1 end if x <= -96 then x = 96 end osN(32,songnum) end
function onDraw() if songnum == 0 then sdT(32,12,'NONE') elseif songnum == 1 then sdT(x,y,'MERRY GO ROUND OF LIFE') elseif songnum == 2 then sdT(32,12,'NATSUMATSURI') elseif songnum == 3 then sdT(32,12,'GAS GAS GAS') elseif songnum == 4 then sdT(32,12,'DEJA VU') elseif songnum == 5 then sdT(32,12,'YAKETY SAX') elseif songnum == 6 then sdT(x,y,'CAMPFIRE SONG SONG') elseif songnum == 7 then sdT(x,y,'TAKE ME HOME COUNTRY ROAD') end end

node.label: Input
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
s=string M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTx=S.drawText dL=S.drawLine dTxB=S.drawTextBox dCF=S.drawCircleF I=input tU=table.unpack F=string.format
function dS(x,y,w,h)dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h
C(243,243,243)dF(0,0,w,h) C(25,25,25)logo(cw-22-7,ch-4)
end
function logo(x,y) x=x-2 y=y-1 dF(x+2,y+1,1,3)dF(x+3,y+2,1,3)dF(x+6,y+1,1,3)dF(x+5,y+2,1,3)dF(x+3,y+3,4,1)dS(x+2,y+4,5,4)dF(x+10,y+4,1,4)d(x+11,y+5)dF(x+12,y+4,2,1)dF(x+15,y+5,3,1)dF(x+15,y+5,1,3)dF(x+15,y+7,2,1)dF(x+17,y+5,1,2)d(x+18,y+7)dF(x+20,y+2,1,6)d(x+21,y+5)d(x+21,y+7)d(x+22,y+6)dF(x+24,y+2,1,6)d(x+25,y+5)d(x+25,y+7)d(x+26,y+6)dF(x+28,y+6,1,2)d(x+28,y+4)dF(x+30,y+4,3,1)dF(x+31,y+2,1,6)dF(x+36,y+3,1,4)dF(x+37,y+2,3,1)dF(x+37,y+7,3,1)dF(x+40,y+3,1,4)dF(x+43,y+2,3,1)d(x+42,y+3)d(x+43,y+4)d(x+44,y+5)d(x+45,y+6)dF(x+42,y+7,3,1)dTx(x+48,y-1,"PRO")C(150,0,0)dF(x+2,y+10,11,1)C(0,50,0)dF(x+2+11,y+10,11,1)C(0,38,255)dF(x+2+11*2,y+10,11,1)C(75,75,0)dF(x+2+11*3,y+10,11,1)end

Ma=math S=screen C=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output T=true function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH,t)return t and X>rX and Y>rY and X<rX+rW and Y<rY+rH end function ir(rX,u,rY)return iR(rX+u*9,rY,9,10,t)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return table.unpack(a)end function onTick()W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)t=I.getBool(1)n=W/2-46 m=H-63 onB=ir(n,0,m) twB=ir(n,1,m) thB=ir(n,2,m) foB=ir(n,3,m) fiB=ir(n,4,m) siB=ir(n,5,m) seB=ir(n,6,m) eiB=ir(n,7,m) niB=ir(n,8,m) zeB=ir(n,9,m)m=m+10 qB=ir(n,0,m) wB=ir(n,1,m) eB=ir(n,2,m) rB=ir(n,3,m) tB=ir(n,4,m) yB=ir(n,5,m) uB=ir(n,6,m) iB=ir(n,7,m) oB=ir(n,8,m) pB=ir(n,9,m)n=n+2+2 m=m+10 aB=ir(n,0,m) sB=ir(n,1,m) dB=ir(n,2,m) fB=ir(n,3,m) gB=ir(n,4,m) hB=ir(n,5,m) jB=ir(n,6,m) kB=ir(n,7,m) lB=ir(n,8,m)m=m+10 stB=iR(n-4,m,13,21,t) baB=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t) zB=ir(n,1,m) xB=ir(n,2,m) cB=ir(n,3,m) vB=ir(n,4,m) bB=ir(n,5,m) nB=ir(n,6,m) mB=ir(n,7,m)m=m+10 coB=ir(n,1,m) fuB=ir(n,7,m) spB=iR(n+9*2,m,44,10,t) et=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t) tab=iR(n-3,m,12,9,t)
ou=false if baB or et or tab then ou=T end if onB or twB or thB or foB or fiB or siB or seB or eiB or niB or zeB then ou=T end if qB or wB or eB or rB or tB or yB or uB or iB or oB or pB then ou=T end if aB or sB or dB or fB or gB or hB or jB or kB or lB then ou=T end if zB or xB or cB or vB or bB or nB or mB then ou=T end if spB or coB or cB or fuB or bB or nB or mB then ou=T end O.setBool(1,ou) end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox I=input oB=output.setBool tU=table.unpack tN=tonumber tbh=0 tbb=0 ppr=0 nm=0 a=0 T=true F=false chc=0 nnc=0 emc=0 n2c=0 efc=0 ppwr=0 asd=45 ax=asd axf=F bsd=55 bx=bsd bxf=F function c(s)C(243,243,243)if s==0 then C(146,160,169)end if s==1 then C(125,125,125)end if s==2 then C(75,75,75)end if s==3 then C(25,25,25)end if s==4 then C(15,15,15)end end function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function gB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick()W,H,X,Y,A1,ti,pwr,lpp=gN(1,2,3,4,8,21,22,26)iP,tbo,nS,wS,TM,sy,n1,nn2=gB(1,30,5,9,15,21,23,7)if wS and ax>0 then ax=ax-5 end if not wS and ax<asd then ax=ax+5 end pw1=string.format("%.0f",pwr*100).."%"emP=pwr<=lpp if pwr>ppr then pw1="+"..pw1 cha=T else cha=F end if not n1 then pw1="?%"end ppr=pwr mi=M.floor((1440*ti)%60)hr=M.floor(24*ti)if mi<10 then mi='0'..mi end if hr<10 then hr='0'..hr end time=hr..":"..mi nn=A1==2 or A1==3 or A1>6 nc=0 if cha or emP then nc=nc+1 end if nn then nc=nc+1 end if nc>0 and nm<9 then nm=nm+1 end if nc==0 and nm>0 then nm=nm-1 end nP=iP and iR(0,H-9,25,9)if nS and iP and not iR(1,H-65,68,55)then nP=T end wP=iP and iR(W-28-nm,H-9,28+nm,9)if iP and wS and not iR(W-55,H-33,54,22)then wP=T end if not tbo and nn and tbb<9 then tbb=tbb+1 end if tbo and not nn and tbb>0 then tbb=tbb-1 end if sy then if A1==7 and tbh<9 then tbh=tbh+1 end if A1~=7 and tbh>0 then tbh=tbh-1 end else if tbh<9 then tbh=tbh+1 end if nS then nP=T end if wS then wP=T end end oB(5,nP)oB(9,wP)if cha and not qi then chf=T qi=T end K=150 if chf then chc=chc+1 end if chc>K then chf=F chc=0 end if not cha then qi=F end if nn and not nnu then nnf=T nnu=T end if nnf then nnc=nnc+1 end if nnc>K then nnf=F nnc=0 end if not nn then nnu=F end if emP and not emu then emf=T emu=T end if emf then emc=emc+1 end if emc>K then emf=F emc=0 end if not emP then emu=F end if nn2 and not n2u then n2f=T n2u=T end if n2f then n2c=n2c+1 end if n2c>K then n2f=F n2c=0 end if not nn2 then n2u=F end npp=chc>0 or (emc>0 and sy)or nnc>0 or n2c>0 or efc>0 if npp and bx>0 then bx=bx-5 end if not npp and bx<bsd then bx=bx+5 end end function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()h=h-1 kc=0 if cha or emP or (not n1)then kc=kc+1 end if nn then kc=kc+1 end kc=kc*10 if wS or ax<asd then c()dS(w-55,h-23-kc+ax,54,12+kc)c(0)dS(w-55,h-23-kc+ax,54,3+kc)c(3)dTB(w-55,h-20+ax,54,9,time,0,0)ix=w-53 iy=h-30+ax if n1 then if cha then ba(ix,iy,"Charging",1)iy=iy-10 elseif emP then ba(ix,iy,"Batt Low",2)iy=iy-10 end else ba(ix,iy,"NO N1",3)iy=iy-10 end if nn then ba(ix,iy,"NO Split",3)iy=iy-10 end else if (chc>0 and cha)then T1="Charging"D=1 elseif emc>0 then T1="Batt Low"D=2 end if nnc>0 then T1="NO split"D=3 end if n2c>0 then T1="NO N1"D=3 end if (npp or bx<bsd)and sy then ba(w-51+bx,h-20,T1,D)end end h=h+1 c(1)dF(0,h-10+tbh*1.5,w,1)c()dF(0,h-9+tbh,w,9)c(1)dS(1,h-8+tbh,23,7)C(0,100,45)dS(1,h-8+tbh,23*pwr,7)c(3)dTB(1,h-8+tbh,23,7,pw1,0,0)c()dS(w-28-nm,h-8+tbh,27+nm,7)c(3)if n1 then dTX(w-26-nm,h-7+tbh,hr)dTX(w-16-nm,h-7+tbh,":")dTX(w-12-nm,h-7+tbh,mi)else dTB(w-27-nm,h-10+tbh,27,7,"...",0,0)end if nS then c()dS(1,h-8,23,7)c(3)d(10,h-6)d(11,h-5)d(12,h-4)d(13,h-5)d(14,h-6)end if wS then c()dS(w-28-nm,h-8,27,7)c(3)d(w-15-nm,h-4)d(w-14-nm,h-5)d(w-16-nm,h-5)d(w-14-nm,h-5)d(w-17-nm,h-6)d(w-13-nm,h-6)end if nc>0 or nm>0 then c(1)dS(w-9+9-nm,h-8+tbh,8,7)c(3)dTB(w-9+9-nm,h-8+tbh,8,7,nc,0,0)end end function ba(x,y,s,u)c()dS(x,y,50,9)c(3)dTX(x+9,y+2,s)if u==1 then EL(x+2,y+2)end if u==2 then BA(x+2,y+2)end if u==3 then IN(x+2,y+2)end end function EL(x,y)C(75,75,0)d(x+2,y)d(x+1,y+1)dF(x,y+2,4,1)d(x+2,y+3)d(x+1,y+4)end function BA(x,y)c(3)S.drawRect(x,y,3,4)dF(x+4,y+1,1,3)C(150,0,0)dF(x+1,y+1,1,3)end function IN(x,y)C(0,19,50)dS(x,y,5,5)c(2)dF(x+2,y,1,3)d(x+2,y+4)end

function onDraw() w = screen.getWidth() h = screen.getHeight() w1 = w*0.1 w2 = w*0.2 w3 = w*0.3 w4 = w*0.4 w5 = w*0.5 w6 = w*0.6 w7 = w*0.7 w8 = w*0.8 w9 = w*0.9 wh = w1/2 h1 = h*0.1 h2 = h*0.2 h3 = h*0.3 h4 = h*0.4 h5 = h*0.5 h6 = h*0.6 h7 = h*0.7 h8 = h*0.8 h9 = h*0.9 hh = h1/2
--sky sc(39,103,235) sdrf(0,0,w,h)
--clouds sca(255,255,255,180) sdtf(0,hh/2,0,hh,wh,hh) sdtf(wh,hh,w1,h1,w1,hh) sdtf(wh+hh,hh,w1,h1,w1,hh) sdtf(wh,hh/2,w1,h1,w2,h1) sdtf(w1+w1/3,hh/2,w2-w1/3,hh,w1+w1/3,hh) sdtf(w2,h1,w2-w1/3,hh,w1+w1/3,hh)
sdtf(w2,h2+h1/3,w2+wh,h2+h1/3,w2+w1/3,h3-h1/3) sdtf(w2+w1/3,h2+hh,w2+wh,h2+h1/3,w2+w1/3,h3-h1/3) sdtf(w2+wh,h2+hh,w3,h2+h1/4,w3,h2+hh) sdtf(w3+wh,h3,w3,h2+h1/4,w3,h2+hh)
sdcf(w3+wh,0,hh/2)
sdtf(w4+wh,h3+hh,w5,h3+hh,w5,h4,hh) sdrf(w5,h3+hh,wh,hh)
sdtf(w2+wh,h5-h1/3,w4,h5-h1/3,w4,h5) sdcf(w5+wh,h3-h1/3,wh/7)
sdrf(w8+wh,0,w1+wh,h1) sdrf(w8+wh,h1,wh+wh/2,hh/2) sdtf(w8+wh,h1+hh/2,w9-wh/2,h2,w9+wh/2,h1+hh) sdtf(w8+wh,h1+hh/2,w9-wh/2,h2,w8,h1+hh/2) sdtf(w8+wh,h1+hh/2,w8,h1+hh/2,w8+wh,hh) sdtf(w9,h1+hh,w,h1+hh,w,h1) sdtf(w9+wh/2,h1,w9+wh/2,h1+hh/2,w9+wh,h1) sdtf(w7,0,w7+w1/3,hh,w7+w1/3,0) sdtf(w7+w1/3,hh,w7+w1/3,0,w8,0) sdtf(w7+wh/2,0,w8,h1,w8+wh/2,0) sdtf(w8,0,w8+wh,0,w8+wh,h1) sdcf(w7+w1/3,h1,hh/2)
sdtf(w8,h5-h1/3,w8+w1/3,h4-h1/4,w7+wh,h4-h1/4) sdtf(w8,h5-h1/3,w8+w1/3,h4-h1/4,w9,h4+h1/3) sdtf(w9-w1/4,h4-h1/5,w8+w1/3,h4-h1/4,w9,h4+h1/3)
sdtf(w7+wh,h3,w8,h3+hh,w8+w1/4,h3) sdtf(w7+wh,h3,w8,h3+hh,w7+wh,h4-h1/3) sdtf(w7+wh,h3,w7,h3+hh,w7+wh,h4-h1/3) sdtf(w8+wh,h4-h1/3,w8,h3+hh,w8+w1/4,h3)
sdtf(w7,h4-h1/4,w7-w1/3,h4,w7,h4+hh) sdtf(w7,h4-h1/4,w7+w1/3,h4+hh,w7,h4+hh)
--lighter clouds sca(255,255,255,80) sdtf(w3,0,w4+wh,0,w6+wh,h2+hh) sdtf(w4,0,w5,0,w6+wh,h1+hh) sdtf(w5+hh,0,w6+wh,0,w7-wh/2,h1)
sdtf(w2-wh,hh,w2,h1+hh,w2+wh,h1) sdtf(w2,h1,w3-wh/2,h1,w2+wh,hh)
sdtf(w,h2,w,h2+hh,w-w1/3,h2+hh/2)
sdcf(w6,h3,wh/7) sdcf(w5+wh/2,h3,wh/8)
--medium clouds sca(255,255,255,120) sdtf(wh,h3+hh/2,w1+wh,h4,w2,h4-hh) sdtf(w2+wh/2,h4+hh/2,w1+wh,h4,w2,h4-hh)
sdrf(w9+w1/3,h3-h1/3,w1-w1/3,h1/3) sdtf(w9+w1/3,h3-h1/3,w9+wh,h2+hh,w,h3-h1/3) sdtf(w9+w1/3,h3-h1/3,w9,h3,w9+w1/3,h3+h1/3) sdtf(w9+w1/3,h3+h1/3,w9+w1/3,h3,w9+wh,h3) sdtf(w9+wh,h3,w,h3,w,h3+hh)
sdrf(w6,h5+hh,w4,h1) sdrf(w7+wh,h5+h1/3,w4,h1/5)
sdtf(w9,h5+h1/3,w6,h4+hh,w+wh,h4-h1/4) sdtf(w9,h5+h1/3,w,h5,w,h5+hh) sdtf(w5,h5,w7+wh,h5+hh,w6+wh,h5+hh) sdtf(w5,h5,w5+wh,h5+h1/3,w4,h5)
--background mountains sc(56,66,135) sdtf(w8,h7-hh,w,h7-hh,w,h6) sdtf(w9,h7-hh,w9+wh,h6-hh/2,w,h6+hh)
--hill sc(141,180,27) sdtf(0,h5+hh,w3,h5,w8,h7) sdrf(0,h7-hh,w,h2-hh) sdtf(0,h5+hh,0,h7-hh,w8,h7) sc(56,66,135) sdl(0,h5+hh-1,0+wh/2,h5+hh-1)
sc(60,84,36) sdtf(w3,h5,w8,h7,w,h7-hh) sdl(w8,h7-1,w,h8-hh/2)
sc(69,95,22) sdrf(0,h8,w,h2) sdtf(0,h7,w5,h8,0,h8) sdcf(w9,h7+hh/1.5,hh/4)
sc(30,45,21) sdl(0,h8+hh,w,h8) sdtf(0,h8,0,h8+hh+hh/2,w5+wh,h8+hh/2)
sca(0,0,0,140) sdrf(0,0,w,h) end
function sc(x,y,z) screen.setColor(x,y,z) end function sca(x,y,z,a) screen.setColor(x,y,z,a) end function sdrf(x,y,a,b) screen.drawRectF(x,y,a,b) end function sdtf(x1,x2,y1,y2,z1,z2) screen.drawTriangleF(x1,x2,y1,y2,z1,z2) end function sdcf(x,y,r) screen.drawCircleF(x,y,r) end
function sdl(x1,x2,y1,y2) screen.drawLine(x1,x2,y1,y2) end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dRF=S.drawRectF dTx=S.drawText dTxB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output tU=table.unpack F=string.format P=property.getText O=output oN=O.setNumber oB=O.setBool CH=0 sigS=0 cm1=0
function cp(s) C(243,243,243) if s=="w1" then C(146,160,169)end if s=="g1"then C(125,125,125)end if s=="g2"then C(75,75,75)end if s=="g3"then C(25,25,25)end if s=="g4"then C(15,15,15)end if s=="be3"then C(0,19,50)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end if s=="r" then C(255,0,0)end if s=="r1"then C(100,0,0)end end
function t(x,y,s,c) cp(c) n=string.len(s) dSRF(x,y,n*5+3,7)cp("g4")dTxB(x+2,y,n*5+3,7,s,-1,0)end function dSRF(x,y,w,h)dRF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dRF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dRF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end function inR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function getB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() W,H,X,Y,app,sch=getN(1,2,3,4,8,23) isP=getB(1) H=H-9 nf=mS or nS or tS or wS
if app==3 then ht={P("MainCam"),P("Cam1"),P("Cam2")} if not nf then p1=isP and inR(2,H-16,8,7) p2=isP and inR(11,H-16,8,7) p3=isP and inR(20,H-16,8,7) end O.setBool(24,true) if c23==nil then c23=1 end if p1 then c23=1 end if p2 then c23=2 end if p3 then c23=3 end oN(23,c23) oB(30,p1 or p2 or p3) else O.setBool(24,false) end
oN(1,CH)
end
function onDraw() w=S.getWidth() h=S.getHeight() cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h h=h-10
if app==3 then if w==W then t(1,h-8,ht[sch],"") cp("g1")dSRF(1,h-16,28,7) cp("w1")if sch==1 then cm=1 elseif sch==2 then cm=10 elseif sch==3 then cm=19 else cm=-30 end
if cm>cm1 then cm1=cm1+0.5 end if cm<cm1 then cm1=cm1-0.5 end
dSRF(cm1,h-16,10,7) cp("g4")dTx(4,h-15,"1")dTx(13,h-15,"2")dTx(22,h-15,"3") end end
end

function cp(s) C(243,243,243) if s=="w1"then C(146,160,169)end if s=="g1"then C(125,125,125)end if s=="g2"then C(75,75,75)end if s=="g3"then C(25,25,25)end if s=="g4"then C(15,15,15)end if s=="r"then C(150,0,0)end if s=="y"then C(125,125,0)end if s=="y1"then C(75,75,0)end if s=="g"then C(0,50,0)end if s=="be"then C(0,19,150)end if s=="be1"then C(0,38,255)end if s=="be2"then C(0,38,65)end if s=="be3"then C(0,19,50)end if s=="cya"then C(0,85,85)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end if s=="o"then C(185,39,0)end if s=="o1"then C(175,29,0)end if s=="m"then C(255,0,255)end end function dSRF(x,y,w,h)dRF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dRF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dRF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() sX,sY,WP=getN(1,2,9) R1,G1,B1,A1,R2,G2,B2,A2=getN(11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18) end

if WP==2 then while (sh<=(h)) do C(0,38,65,al) dL(0,sh,w,sh) al=al+255/(h) sh=sh+1 end end
if WP==3 then while (sh<=(h)) do C(0,85,85,al)dL(0,sh,w,sh) al=al+255/(h) sh=sh+1 end end

if WP==5 then while (sh<=(h)) do C(150,0,0,al)dL(0,sh,w,sh) al=al+255/(h) sh=sh+1 end end
if WP==6 then while (sh<=(h)) do C(0,38,65,al)dL(0,sh,w,sh) al=al+255/(h) sh=sh+1 end end
--cus if WP==7 then GRH(0,0,w,h,R1,G1,B1,A1,R2,G2,B2,A2) end
if WP==8 then GRV(0,0,w,h,R1,G1,B1,A1,R2,G2,B2,A2) end

if WP==9 then GRH(0,0,w,h,0,0,0,255,0,9,25,255) cp("w1")dRF(0,h-16,4,1)dRF(55,h-16,w,1)dRF(w-6,0,1,h) dR(w-41,h-92,31,31)dR(w-33,h-70,17,16)dR(w-26,h-56,16,16)dR(w-40,h-50,16,16)dR(w-34,h-36,16,16) word(6,h-20) end
if WP==10 then GRH(0,0,w,h,0,0,0,255,0,9,25,255) end
end
function GRH(x,y,w,h,r1,g1,b1,t1,r2,g2,b2,t2) for i=0,w,1 do C(r1+i*((r2-r1)/w),g1+i*((g2-g1)/w),b1+i*((b2-b1)/w),t1+i*((t2-t1)/w)) dRF(x+i, y, 1, h) end end
function GRV(x,y,w,h,r1,g1,b1,o1,r2,g2,b2,o2) for i=0,h,1 do C(r1+i*((r2-r1)/h),g1+i*((g2-g1)/h),b1+i*((b2-b1)/h),o1+i*((o2-o1)/h)) dRF(x,y+i,w,1)end end

end

function cp(s) C(243,243,243) if s=="w1"then C(146,160,169)end if s=="g1"then C(125,125,125)end if s=="g2"then C(75,75,75)end if s=="g3"then C(25,25,25)end if s=="g4"then C(15,15,15)end if s=="r"then C(150,0,0)end if s=="y"then C(125,125,0)end if s=="y1"then C(75,75,0)end if s=="g"then C(0,50,0)end if s=="be"then C(0,19,150)end if s=="be1"then C(0,38,255)end if s=="be2"then C(0,38,65)end if s=="be3"then C(0,19,50)end if s=="cya"then C(0,85,85)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end if s=="o"then C(185,39,0)end if s=="o1"then C(175,29,0)end if s=="m"then C(255,0,255)end end function dSRF(x,y,w,h)dRF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dRF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dRF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() sX,sY,WP=getN(1,2,9) R1,G1,B1,A1,R2,G2,B2,A2=getN(11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18) end
function B(b) if b==2 or b==3 or b==5 then cp("bk")end if b==4 then cp("cya")end if b==6 then cp("w1")end end

if WP>=2 and WP<=8 then s=255 cp() logo(8,ch-5,true) end
--if WP==9 then end
end function logo(x,y,u) x=x-2 y=y-1 word(x,y) if u then C(150,0,0,s) end dRF(x+2,y+10,11,1) if u then C(0,50,0,s) end dRF(x+2+11,y+10,11,1) if u then C(0,38,255,s) end dRF(x+2+11*2,y+10,11,1) if u then C(75,75,0,s) end dRF(x+2+11*3,y+10,11,1) end
function word(x,y) dRF(x+2,y+1,1,3)dRF(x+3,y+2,1,3)dRF(x+6,y+1,1,3)dRF(x+5,y+2,1,3)dRF(x+3,y+3,4,1)dSRF(x+2,y+4,5,4)dRF(x+10,y+4,1,4)dRF(x+11,y+5,1,1)dRF(x+12,y+4,2,1)dRF(x+15,y+5,3,1)dRF(x+15,y+5,1,3)dRF(x+15,y+7,2,1)dRF(x+17,y+5,1,2)dRF(x+18,y+7,1,1)dRF(x+20,y+2,1,6)dRF(x+21,y+5,1,1)dRF(x+21,y+7,1,1)dRF(x+22,y+6,1,1)dRF(x+24,y+2,1,6)dRF(x+25,y+5,1,1)dRF(x+25,y+7,1,1)dRF(x+26,y+6,1,1)dRF(x+28,y+6,1,2)dRF(x+28,y+4,1,1)dRF(x+30,y+4,3,1)dRF(x+31,y+2,1,6)dRF(x+36,y+3,1,4)dRF(x+37,y+2,3,1)dRF(x+37,y+7,3,1)dRF(x+40,y+3,1,4)dRF(x+43,y+2,3,1)dRF(x+42,y+3,1,1)dRF(x+43,y+4,1,1)dRF(x+44,y+5,1,1)dRF(x+45,y+6,1,1)dRF(x+42,y+7,3,1) end

function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function iS(rX,rY,V)return iR(rX,rY,V,V)end function getB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end
CLL=0 CRR=0
function onTick()
W,H,X,Y,A1,a1,a2=getN(1,2,3,4,7,8,9)iP,so,NN=getB(1,3,4)
--Split Menu if so then if NN then ff=iP and iR(2,11,W-4,H-22)else ff=iP and iR(2,11,W-4,15)ll=iP and iR(2,28,W/2-4,H-39)rr=iP and iR(W/2+2,28,W/2-4,H-39)end else ff=F ll=F rr=F end
cl=iP and iS(W/2-8,1,7) cr=iP and iS(W-8,1,7) if a1>0 then sl=iP and iS(W/2-16,1,7) or (iP and so and not iR(2,11,W-4,H-22)) end if a2>0 or A1>0 then sr=iP and iS(W-16,1,7) or (iP and so and not iR(2,11,W-4,H-22)) end
if cl and so then CLL=1 end if cr and so then CRR=1 end
if ff then BP=1 elseif ll then BP=2 elseif rr then BP=3 elseif sl then BP=4 elseif sr then BP=5 elseif cl then BP=6 elseif cr then BP=7 else BP=0 end
if not so then if CLL>0 then BP=6 CLL=0 end if CRR>0 then BP=7 CRR=0 end end
oN(1,BP)end

BS=10 B=false bi=0 apL=0 a1L=0 a2L=0
function cp(s) C(255,255,255) if s=="w" then C(255,255,255) elseif s=="g1" then C(125,125,125) elseif s=="g2" then C(75,75,75) elseif s=="g3" then C(25,25,25) elseif s=="r" then C(150,0,0) elseif s=="y" then C(125,125,0) elseif s=="g" then C(0,50,0) elseif s=="be" then C(0,19,150) elseif s=="be1" then C(0,38,255) elseif s=="bk" then C(0,0,0) end end
function onTick() app=I.getNumber(8) a1=I.getNumber(13) a2=I.getNumber(14) rain=I.getNumber(22) humidity=I.getNumber(23) n2=I.getBool(24) cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1
if (app==apL or a1==a1L or a2==a2L) then bi=bi+1 else bi=0 end if app~=apL or (a1~=a1L and a2~=1) or (a2~=a2L and a1~=1) then bi=0 BS=10 end if bi==1 then B=true BS=10 end if B then BS=BS-2 end if BS<0 then B=false BS=0 end
apL=app a1L=a1 a2L=a2
end
function onDraw() w=screen.getWidth() h=screen.getHeight() cw=w/2
if app==1 or a1==1 or a2==1 then if a2 then aa=w/2 else aa=0 end
if app==1 then xc=16 elseif a2==1 then xc=9+aa else xc=9 end if a1==1 or a2==1 then yc=9+BS else yc=19+BS end
if n2 then if rain >= 0.01 and rain < 0.25 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15, 10) end
if rain >= 0.25 and rain <= 1 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd) dRF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7) dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4) dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5) dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5) dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5) end
if rain < 0.01 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15,12) elseif rain < 0.04 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) elseif rain < 0.1 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.25 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.5 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) elseif rain <0.75 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) dL(xc+23,yc+20,xc+19.5,yc+28) dL(xc+24,yc+20,xc+20.5,yc+28) else C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) C(255,255,20) dTF(xc+27,yc+7,xc+19,yc+18,xc+23.5,yc+18) dTF(xc+24.5,yc+15,xc+29,yc+15,xc+19,yc+27) end
if humidity > 0.1 then C(180,180,220,(humidity-0.1)*283) dL(xc+2,yc+4,xc+15,yc+4) dL(xc+2,yc+7,xc+15,yc+7) dL(xc+2,yc+10,xc+15,yc+10) dL(xc+2,yc+13,xc+15,yc+13) dL(xc+2,yc+16,xc+15,yc+16)
C(0,0,10,(humidity-0.1)*150) dL(xc+2,yc+5,xc+15,yc+5) dL(xc+2,yc+8,xc+15,yc+8) dL(xc+2,yc+11,xc+15,yc+11) dL(xc+2,yc+14,xc+15,yc+14) dL(xc+2,yc+17,xc+15,yc+17) end end
end if not n2 then C(75,75,75) if app==1 then dRF(0,BS,w,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,w,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a1==1 then dRF(0,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a2==1 then dRF(cw,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(cw,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end end end

end

function t(x,y,s,c) cp(c) n=string.len(s) dSRF(x,y,n*5+3,7)cp("g4")dTxB(x+2,y,n*5+3,7,s,-1,0)end function dSRF(x,y,w,h)dRF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dRF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dRF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end function inR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function getB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() W,H,X,Y,app,sch=getN(1,2,3,4,7,23) isP=getB(1) H=H-9 nf=mS or nS or tS or wS
if app==3 then ht={P("MainCam"),P("Cam1"),P("Cam2")} if not nf then p1=isP and inR(2,H-16,8,7) p2=isP and inR(11,H-16,8,7) p3=isP and inR(20,H-16,8,7) end O.setBool(24,true) if c23==nil then c23=1 end if p1 then c23=1 end if p2 then c23=2 end if p3 then c23=3 end oN(23,c23) oB(30,p1 or p2 or p3) else O.setBool(24,false) end
oN(1,CH)
end
function onDraw() w=S.getWidth() h=S.getHeight() cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h h=h-10
if app==3 then if w==W then t(1,h-8,ht[sch],"") cp("g1")dSRF(1,h-16,28,7) cp("w1")if sch==1 then cm=1 elseif sch==2 then cm=10 elseif sch==3 then cm=19 else cm=-30 end
if cm>cm1 then cm1=cm1+0.5 end if cm<cm1 then cm1=cm1-0.5 end
dSRF(cm1,h-16,10,7) cp("g4")dTx(4,h-15,"1")dTx(13,h-15,"2")dTx(22,h-15,"3") end end
end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dRF=S.drawRectF dTx=S.drawText dTxB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output tU=table.unpack F=string.format P=property.getText O=output oN=O.setNumber oB=O.setBool
function cp(s) C(255,255,255) if s=="w1" then C(146,160,169)end if s=="g1"then C(125,125,125)end if s=="g2"then C(75,75,75)end if s=="g3"then C(25,25,25)end if s=="g4"then C(15,15,15)end if s=="be3"then C(0,19,50)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end if s=="r" then C(255,0,0)end if s=="r1"then C(100,0,0)end end
function t(x,y,s,c) cp(c) n=string.len(s) dSRF(x,y,n*5+3,7)cp("g4")dTxB(x+2,y,n*5+3,7,s,-1,0)end function dSRF(x,y,w,h)dRF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dRF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dRF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2) end function inR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function getB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function getN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() W,H,X,Y,app,sigs,CH=getN(1,2,3,4,7,21,22) isP,n3,IR=getB(1,10,21) H=H-9 nf=mS or nS or tS or wS
sigA=tonumber(F("%.1f",sigs))
if n3 then if app==3 and (not nf) then gdn=isP and inR(W-25,H-8,3,5)gup=isP and inR(W-6,H-8,3,5) --channel up=isP and inR(W-28,H-27-9,8,8)dn=isP and inR(W-28,H-11-9,8,8) --pit rt=isP and inR(W-20,H-19-9,8,8)lt=isP and inR(W-36,H-19-9,8,8) --piv zp=isP and inR(W-10,H-27-9,7,7)zm=isP and inR(W-10,H-19-9,7,7) --pov re=isP and inR(W-28,H-19-9,8,8) --reset ir=isP and inR(W-16,H-10-9,13,7) --IR
oB(1,ir) oB(18,gdn) oB(19,gup) oB(20,re) oB(21,up) oB(22,dn) oB(23,rt) oB(24,lt) oB(25,zp) oB(26,zm)
end end end
function onDraw() w=S.getWidth() h=S.getHeight() cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h h=h-10 if n3 then if app==3 then if w==W then
cp()dSRF(w-38,h-38,37,37) cp("w1")dSRF(w-38,h-38,37,28)
cp("g2")dSRF(w-10,h-36,7,15) cp("g1")dSRF(w-28,h-36,8,24)dSRF(w-36,h-28,24,8)dSRF(w-30,h-30,12,12) if zp then cp() else cp("g1") end dSRF(w-10,h-36,7,7) if zm then cp() else cp("g1") end dSRF(w-10,h-28,7,7) if up then cp()dSRF(w-28,h-36,8,10)end if dn then cp()dSRF(w-28,h-22,8,10)end if lt then cp()dSRF(w-36,h-28,10,8)end if rt then cp()dSRF(w-22,h-28,10,8)end if re then cp("g2") else cp("g3") end dSRF(w-28,h-28,8,8) if IR then cp("r") else cp("r1") end dSRF(w-16,h-19,13,7)cp()dTxB(w-16,h-19,13,7,"IR",0,0) r(w-26,h-26)
cp("g3")dRF(w-25,h-35,2,6)dRF(w-26,h-34,4,1)dRF(w-27,h-33,6,1) dRF(w-25,h-19,2,6)dRF(w-26,h-15,4,1)dRF(w-27,h-16,6,1) dRF(w-33,h-27,2,5)dRF(w-34,h-26,4,1)dRF(w-35,h-25,6,1)dRF(w-32,h-23,3,2)
dRF(w-33+16,h-27,2,5)dRF(w-34+16,h-26,4,1)dRF(w-35+16,h-25,6,1)dRF(w-32+13,h-23,3,2)
dRF(w-8,h-33,3,1)dRF(w-7,h-34,1,3)dRF(w-8,h-25,3,1)
cp("g3")d(w-36,h-6)dRF(w-35,h-7,2,1)dRF(w-35,h-5,2,1) dRF(w-32,h-7,1,3)d(w-31,h-6)dRF(w-30,h-7,1,3) d(w-28,h-5) if gdn then dRF(w-25,h-8,3,5) end dTx(w-25,h-8,"<") dTxB(w-21,h-8,15,5,F("%.0f",CH),0,0) if sigA>0 then dTxB(w-54,h-8,15,5,sigA,-1,0)end
if gup then dRF(w-6,h-8,3,5) end dTx(w-6,h-8,">")
end end end end
function d(x,y) dRF(x,y,1,1)end function r(x,y) dRF(x,y,3,1)dRF(x,y,3,1)dRF(x,y,1,4)dRF(x,y+2,3,1)d(x+3,y+1)d(x+3,y+3)end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTx=S.drawText dTxB=S.drawTextBox I=input tU=table.unpack F=string.format BS=10 B=false bi=0 apL=-1 a1L=-1 a2L=-1 function cp(s)C(243,243,243) if s=="w1"then C(146,160,169)end if s==1 then C(125,125,125)end if s==2 then C(75,75,75)end if s==3 then C(25,25,25)end if s==4 then C(15,15,15)end if s=="r"then C(150,0,0)end if s=="g"then C(0,50,0)end if s=="be"then C(0,19,150)end if s=="be1"then C(0,38,255)end if s=="be2"then C(0,38,65)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end end
function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end
function onTick() app,a1,a2=gN(7,8,9)
if (app==apL or a1==a1L or a2==a2L)then bi=bi+1 else bi=0 end if app~=apL or (a1~=a1L and a2~=8)or (a2~=a2L and a1~=8)then bi=0 BS=10 end if bi==1 then B=true BS=10 end if B then BS=BS-2 end if BS<0 then B=false BS=0 end
apL=app a1L=a1 a2L=a2 end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()
cw=w/2 ch=h/2
if app==8 then
cp(2)dF(0,0,w,h) p(cw-8,ch-17) cp(4) dTxB(cw-27,ch+2,55,13," Only on\nmain screen",0,0)
end end
function p(x,y)cp(4)dF(x+3,y+3,10,1)dF(x+2,y+4,2,1)dF(x+12,y+4,2,1)dF(x+2,y+5,1,3)dF(x+13,y+5,1,3)dF(x+2,y+8,2,1)dF(x+12,y+8,2,1)dF(x+3,y+9,2,1)dF(x+8,y+9,5,1)dF(x+5,y+10,3,1)dF(x+4,y+11,3,1)dF(x+3,y+12,2,1)d(x+6,y+5)d(x+8,y+5)d(x+6,y+8)dF(x+7,y+7,3,1)end

S=screen I=input O=output oN=O.setNumber oB=O.setBool tU=table.unpack T=true F=false
out=1
function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function gB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function onTick() M,L,R=gN(1,2,3) Mb,Lb,Rb=gB(1,2,3)
if Mb then out=M end if Lb then out=L end if Rb then out=R end oN(1,out) end

M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input tU=table.unpack
function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end if s==22 then r,g,b=175,29,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=75,75,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function dArc(...)local a,b,c,d,e,f,g=...d=d or 0;e=e or 360;g=g or 22.5;if e<d then e,d=d,e end;local h,i,j,k,l,m=false,0,0,0,0,0;repeat h=h and M.min(h+g,e)or d;m=(h-90)*pi/180;i,j=a+c*co(m),b+c*si(m)if h~=d then if f then dTF(a,b,k,l,i,j)else dL(k,l,i,j)end end;k,l=i,j until h>=e end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end
function onTick() ap,cD,wS,wD,radi,rain,fog,temp=gN(8,27,25,26,21,22,23,24)cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1 local nWD=wD+cD nWD=nWD-M.floor(nWD) t7=cD-wD if cD-wD<-0.5 then t7=0.5-(wD-cD-0.5)elseif cD-wD>0.5 then t7=-0.5+(wD-cD+0.5)end if t7>-0.0625 and t7<0.0625 then TEXT="N" elseif t7>0.0625 and t7<0.1875 then TEXT="NW" elseif t7>-0.1875 and t7<-0.0625 then TEXT="NE" elseif t7>0.4375 or t7<-0.4375 then TEXT="S" elseif t7>0.3125 and t7<0.4375 then TEXT="SW" elseif t7>-0.4375 and t7<-0.3125 then TEXT="SE" elseif t7>0.1875 and t7<0.3125 then TEXT="W" elseif t7>-0.3125 and t7<-0.1875 then TEXT="E"end end
function onDraw()if ap~=1 then return end w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 --greens c(54)dF(0,8,w,h)if n1 then C(0,0,0,((ti-0.5)*2*255)-1)end cloud(-19,23)cloud(64-9,16)C(0,35,0)dCF(54,h+6,33)c(41)dCF(10,h-6,33)
cTemp(64/2-14,ch+ch/4-5) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch-34,rain,"rain",53,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch-34,fog,"fog",4,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch+2,radi*0.01,"radi",41,2) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch+2,wS*0.539957*0.01,"wind",54,3) end
function cTemp(x,y)v=dd(temp) if v>=30 or v<=5 then c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,28,11)end if v>=30 then c(11)dS(x,y,28,11) elseif v<=5 then c(53)dS(x,y,28,11)end c()dTB(x-18,y+3,64,5,v.."'C",0,0)end
function guage(x,y,v,t,co,ty)st=90 en=321 c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,38,33)c()dS(x,y,38,33) c(5,100)dS(x+2,y+18,23,9)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+20,y+17,14-j,0,360)end --shade c(2)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end--bar if ty>1 then--gauge c(co,v*255*5)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end else c(co)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0-st,en*v-90)end end c(4)dS(x+1,y+17,23,9)sv=dd(v*100)--banner if ty==1 then sv=sv.."%"end c()dTB(x+3,y+19,20,5,t,0,0)c(9) if ty==3 then if i==100 then xd=x-2 else xd=x end dTB(xd+14,y+7,15,5,sv,-1,0)kmh(x+17,y+13) if sv>=0.1 then dTX(x+28,y+26,TEXT)end else if i==100 then xd=x-1 else xd=x end dTB(xd+10,y+10,20,5,sv,0,0)end end
function kmh(x,y) dF(x,y,1,3)dF(x+1,y+1,1,1)d(x+2,y)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+4,y,3,2)dF(x+4,y,1,3)dF(x+6,y,1,3)dF(x+8,y,1,3)d(x+9,y+1)dF(x+10,y,1,3)end function cloud(xc,yc) if rain>=0.25 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd)else c()end dF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7)dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4)dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5)dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5)dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5)end

M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input tU=table.unpack
function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end if s==22 then r,g,b=175,29,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=75,75,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end
function onTick() a1,a2,cD,wS,wD,radi,rain,fog,temp=gN(13,14,27,25,26,21,22,23,24)cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1
rV=rain*54 if dd(rain*54)==0 then rV=0 elseif dd(rain*54)<3 then rV=3 end
fV=fog*54 if dd(fog*54)==0 then fV=0 elseif dd(fog*54)<3 then fV=3 end
if radi>10 then rc=255 else rc=radi/10*255 end wS=wS*0.539957 if wS>10 then wc=255 else wc=wS/10*255 end end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight() cw=w/2 ch=h/2 if a1==1 or a2==1 then w=w/2 cw=cw/2 aa=0 if a2==1 then cw=cw+w aa=w end
c(0)dF(aa,8,w,h)cTemp(cw,ch/2-5)ch=ch-2
c(1)dS(cw-27,ch-4,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+6,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(53)dS(cw-27,ch-4,rV,9) c(2)dS(cw-27,ch+6,fV,9) c(41,rc)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9) c(54,wc)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(5) dTX(cw-24,ch-2,"Rain")dTB(cw-24,ch-2,46,5,dd(rain*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+8,"Fog")dTB(cw-24,ch+8,46,5,dd(fog*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+18,"Radi")dTB(cw-24,ch+18,46,5,dd(radi),1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+28,"Wind")dTB(cw-24,ch+28,46,5,dd(wS*0.539957).."kmh",1,0)
end end
function cTemp(x,y)v=dd(temp) if v>=30 or v<=5 then c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,28,11)end if v>=30 then c(11)dS(x,y,28,11) elseif v<=5 then c(53)dS(x,y,28,11)end if v>=30 or v<=5 then c() else c(9)end dTB(x-18,y+3,64,5,v.."'C",0,0)end

BS=10 B=false bi=0 apL=0 a1L=0 a2L=0
function cp(s) C(255,255,255) if s=="w" then C(255,255,255) elseif s=="g1" then C(125,125,125) elseif s=="g2" then C(75,75,75) elseif s=="g3" then C(25,25,25) elseif s=="r" then C(150,0,0) elseif s=="y" then C(125,125,0) elseif s=="g" then C(0,50,0) elseif s=="be" then C(0,19,150) elseif s=="be1" then C(0,38,255) elseif s=="bk" then C(0,0,0) end end
function onTick() app=I.getNumber(7) a1=I.getNumber(8) a2=I.getNumber(9) rain=I.getNumber(22) humidity=I.getNumber(23) n2=I.getBool(6) cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1
if (app==apL or a1==a1L or a2==a2L) then bi=bi+1 else bi=0 end if app~=apL or (a1~=a1L and a2~=1) or (a2~=a2L and a1~=1) then bi=0 BS=10 end if bi==1 then B=true BS=10 end if B then BS=BS-2 end if BS<0 then B=false BS=0 end
apL=app a1L=a1 a2L=a2
end
function onDraw() w=screen.getWidth() h=screen.getHeight() cw=w/2
if app==1 or a1==1 or a2==1 then if a2 then aa=w/2 else aa=0 end
if app==1 then xc=16 elseif a2==1 then xc=9+aa else xc=9 end if a1==1 or a2==1 then yc=9+BS else yc=19+BS end
if n2 then if rain >= 0.01 and rain < 0.25 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15, 10) end
if rain >= 0.25 and rain <= 1 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd) dRF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7) dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4) dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5) dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5) dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5) end
if rain < 0.01 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15,12) elseif rain < 0.04 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) elseif rain < 0.1 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.25 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.5 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) elseif rain <0.75 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) dL(xc+23,yc+20,xc+19.5,yc+28) dL(xc+24,yc+20,xc+20.5,yc+28) else C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) C(255,255,20) dTF(xc+27,yc+7,xc+19,yc+18,xc+23.5,yc+18) dTF(xc+24.5,yc+15,xc+29,yc+15,xc+19,yc+27) end
if humidity > 0.1 then C(180,180,220,(humidity-0.1)*283) dL(xc+2,yc+4,xc+15,yc+4) dL(xc+2,yc+7,xc+15,yc+7) dL(xc+2,yc+10,xc+15,yc+10) dL(xc+2,yc+13,xc+15,yc+13) dL(xc+2,yc+16,xc+15,yc+16)
C(0,0,10,(humidity-0.1)*150) dL(xc+2,yc+5,xc+15,yc+5) dL(xc+2,yc+8,xc+15,yc+8) dL(xc+2,yc+11,xc+15,yc+11) dL(xc+2,yc+14,xc+15,yc+14) dL(xc+2,yc+17,xc+15,yc+17) end end
end if not n2 then C(75,75,75) if app==1 then dRF(0,BS,w,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,w,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a1==1 then dRF(0,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a2==1 then dRF(cw,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(cw,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end end end

M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input tU=table.unpack
function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end if s==22 then r,g,b=175,29,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=75,75,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function dArc(...)local a,b,c,d,e,f,g=...d=d or 0;e=e or 360;g=g or 22.5;if e<d then e,d=d,e end;local h,i,j,k,l,m=false,0,0,0,0,0;repeat h=h and M.min(h+g,e)or d;m=(h-90)*pi/180;i,j=a+c*co(m),b+c*si(m)if h~=d then if f then dTF(a,b,k,l,i,j)else dL(k,l,i,j)end end;k,l=i,j until h>=e end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end
function onTick() ap,cD,wS,wD,radi,rain,fog,temp=gN(7,27,25,26,21,22,23,24)cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1 local nWD=wD+cD nWD=nWD-M.floor(nWD) t7=cD-wD if cD-wD<-0.5 then t7=0.5-(wD-cD-0.5)elseif cD-wD>0.5 then t7=-0.5+(wD-cD+0.5)end if t7>-0.0625 and t7<0.0625 then TEXT="N" elseif t7>0.0625 and t7<0.1875 then TEXT="NW" elseif t7>-0.1875 and t7<-0.0625 then TEXT="NE" elseif t7>0.4375 or t7<-0.4375 then TEXT="S" elseif t7>0.3125 and t7<0.4375 then TEXT="SW" elseif t7>-0.4375 and t7<-0.3125 then TEXT="SE" elseif t7>0.1875 and t7<0.3125 then TEXT="W" elseif t7>-0.3125 and t7<-0.1875 then TEXT="E"end end
function onDraw()if ap~=1 then return end w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 --greens c(54)dF(0,8,w,h)if n1 then C(0,0,0,((ti-0.5)*2*255)-1)end cloud(-19,23)cloud(64-9,16)C(0,35,0)dCF(54,h+6,33)c(41)dCF(10,h-6,33)
cTemp(64/2-14,ch+ch/4-5) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch-34,rain,"rain",53,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch-34,fog,"fog",4,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch+2,radi*0.01,"radi",41,2) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch+2,wS*0.539957*0.01,"wind",54,3) end
function cTemp(x,y)v=dd(temp) if v>=30 or v<=5 then c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,28,11)end if v>=30 then c(11)dS(x,y,28,11) elseif v<=5 then c(53)dS(x,y,28,11)end c()dTB(x-18,y+3,64,5,v.."'C",0,0)end
function guage(x,y,v,t,co,ty)st=90 en=321 c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,38,33)c()dS(x,y,38,33) c(5,100)dS(x+2,y+18,23,9)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+20,y+17,14-j,0,360)end --shade c(2)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end--bar if ty>1 then--gauge c(co,v*255*5)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end else c(co)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0-st,en*v-90)end end c(4)dS(x+1,y+17,23,9)sv=dd(v*100)--banner if ty==1 then sv=sv.."%"end c()dTB(x+3,y+19,20,5,t,0,0)c(9) if ty==3 then if i==100 then xd=x-2 else xd=x end dTB(xd+14,y+7,15,5,sv,-1,0)kmh(x+17,y+13) if sv>=0.1 then dTX(x+28,y+26,TEXT)end else if i==100 then xd=x-1 else xd=x end dTB(xd+10,y+10,20,5,sv,0,0)end end
function kmh(x,y) dF(x,y,1,3)dF(x+1,y+1,1,1)d(x+2,y)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+4,y,3,2)dF(x+4,y,1,3)dF(x+6,y,1,3)dF(x+8,y,1,3)d(x+9,y+1)dF(x+10,y,1,3)end function cloud(xc,yc) if rain>=0.25 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd)else c()end dF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7)dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4)dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5)dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5)dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5)end

M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input tU=table.unpack
function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end if s==22 then r,g,b=175,29,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=75,75,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end
function onTick() a1,a2,cD,wS,wD,radi,rain,fog,temp=gN(8,9,27,25,26,21,22,23,24)cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1
rV=rain*54 if dd(rain*54)==0 then rV=0 elseif dd(rain*54)<3 then rV=3 end
fV=fog*54 if dd(fog*54)==0 then fV=0 elseif dd(fog*54)<3 then fV=3 end
if radi>10 then rc=255 else rc=radi/10*255 end wS=wS*0.539957 if wS>10 then wc=255 else wc=wS/10*255 end end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight() cw=w/2 ch=h/2 if a1==1 or a2==1 then w=w/2 cw=cw/2 aa=0 if a2==1 then cw=cw+w aa=w end
c(0)dF(aa,8,w,h)cTemp(cw,ch/2-5)ch=ch-2
c(1)dS(cw-27,ch-4,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+6,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(53)dS(cw-27,ch-4,rV,9) c(2)dS(cw-27,ch+6,fV,9) c(41,rc)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9) c(54,wc)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(5) dTX(cw-24,ch-2,"Rain")dTB(cw-24,ch-2,46,5,dd(rain*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+8,"Fog")dTB(cw-24,ch+8,46,5,dd(fog*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+18,"Radi")dTB(cw-24,ch+18,46,5,dd(radi),1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+28,"Wind")dTB(cw-24,ch+28,46,5,dd(wS*0.539957).."kmh",1,0)
end end
function cTemp(x,y)v=dd(temp) if v>=30 or v<=5 then c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,28,11)end if v>=30 then c(11)dS(x,y,28,11) elseif v<=5 then c(53)dS(x,y,28,11)end if v>=30 or v<=5 then c() else c(9)end dTB(x-18,y+3,64,5,v.."'C",0,0)end

BS=10 B=false bi=0 apL=0 a1L=0 a2L=0
function cp(s) C(255,255,255) if s=="w" then C(255,255,255) elseif s=="g1" then C(125,125,125) elseif s=="g2" then C(75,75,75) elseif s=="g3" then C(25,25,25) elseif s=="r" then C(150,0,0) elseif s=="y" then C(125,125,0) elseif s=="g" then C(0,50,0) elseif s=="be" then C(0,19,150) elseif s=="be1" then C(0,38,255) elseif s=="bk" then C(0,0,0) end end
function onTick() app=I.getNumber(7) a1=I.getNumber(8) a2=I.getNumber(9) rain=I.getNumber(22) humidity=I.getNumber(23) n2=I.getBool(6) cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1
if (app==apL or a1==a1L or a2==a2L) then bi=bi+1 else bi=0 end if app~=apL or (a1~=a1L and a2~=1) or (a2~=a2L and a1~=1) then bi=0 BS=10 end if bi==1 then B=true BS=10 end if B then BS=BS-2 end if BS<0 then B=false BS=0 end
apL=app a1L=a1 a2L=a2
end
function onDraw() w=screen.getWidth() h=screen.getHeight() cw=w/2
if app==1 or a1==1 or a2==1 then if a2 then aa=w/2 else aa=0 end
if app==1 then xc=16 elseif a2==1 then xc=9+aa else xc=9 end if a1==1 or a2==1 then yc=9+BS else yc=19+BS end
if n2 then if rain >= 0.01 and rain < 0.25 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15, 10) end
if rain >= 0.25 and rain <= 1 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd) dRF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7) dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4) dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5) dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5) dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5) end
if rain < 0.01 then C(255,255,20) dCF(xc+16,yc+15,12) elseif rain < 0.04 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) elseif rain < 0.1 then C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.25 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) C(100,100,100) dRF(xc+1,yc+13,15,2) dRF(xc+3,yc+9,10,4) dRF(xc+16,yc+18,12,4) dRF(xc+13,yc+22,18,3) elseif rain < 0.5 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+13,yc+20,xc+9.5,yc+28) dL(xc+21,yc+20,xc+17.5,yc+28) dL(xc+22,yc+20,xc+18.5,yc+28) elseif rain <0.75 then C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) dL(xc+23,yc+20,xc+19.5,yc+28) dL(xc+24,yc+20,xc+20.5,yc+28) else C(40,50,220) dL(xc+11,yc+20,xc+7.5,yc+28) dL(xc+12,yc+20,xc+8.5,yc+28) dL(xc+17,yc+20,xc+13.5,yc+28) dL(xc+18,yc+20,xc+14.5,yc+28) C(255,255,20) dTF(xc+27,yc+7,xc+19,yc+18,xc+23.5,yc+18) dTF(xc+24.5,yc+15,xc+29,yc+15,xc+19,yc+27) end
if humidity > 0.1 then C(180,180,220,(humidity-0.1)*283) dL(xc+2,yc+4,xc+15,yc+4) dL(xc+2,yc+7,xc+15,yc+7) dL(xc+2,yc+10,xc+15,yc+10) dL(xc+2,yc+13,xc+15,yc+13) dL(xc+2,yc+16,xc+15,yc+16)
C(0,0,10,(humidity-0.1)*150) dL(xc+2,yc+5,xc+15,yc+5) dL(xc+2,yc+8,xc+15,yc+8) dL(xc+2,yc+11,xc+15,yc+11) dL(xc+2,yc+14,xc+15,yc+14) dL(xc+2,yc+17,xc+15,yc+17) end end
end if not n2 then C(75,75,75) if app==1 then dRF(0,BS,w,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,w,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a1==1 then dRF(0,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(0,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end if a2==1 then dRF(cw,BS,cw,h)C(25,25,25)dTxB(cw,BS,cw,h,"NO Env. Module",0,0)end end end

function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end if s==22 then r,g,b=175,29,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=75,75,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function dArc(...)local a,b,c,d,e,f,g=...d=d or 0;e=e or 360;g=g or 22.5;if e<d then e,d=d,e end;local h,i,j,k,l,m=false,0,0,0,0,0;repeat h=h and M.min(h+g,e)or d;m=(h-90)*pi/180;i,j=a+c*co(m),b+c*si(m)if h~=d then if f then dTF(a,b,k,l,i,j)else dL(k,l,i,j)end end;k,l=i,j until h>=e end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end
function onTick() ap,cD,wS,wD,radi,rain,fog,temp=gN(7,27,25,26,21,22,23,24)cd=(rain-0.25)*4+1 local nWD=wD+cD nWD=nWD-M.floor(nWD) t7=cD-wD if cD-wD<-0.5 then t7=0.5-(wD-cD-0.5)elseif cD-wD>0.5 then t7=-0.5+(wD-cD+0.5)end if t7>-0.0625 and t7<0.0625 then TEXT="N" elseif t7>0.0625 and t7<0.1875 then TEXT="NW" elseif t7>-0.1875 and t7<-0.0625 then TEXT="NE" elseif t7>0.4375 or t7<-0.4375 then TEXT="S" elseif t7>0.3125 and t7<0.4375 then TEXT="SW" elseif t7>-0.4375 and t7<-0.3125 then TEXT="SE" elseif t7>0.1875 and t7<0.3125 then TEXT="W" elseif t7>-0.3125 and t7<-0.1875 then TEXT="E"end end
function onDraw()if ap~=1 then return end w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 --greens c(54)dF(0,8,w,h)if n1 then C(0,0,0,((ti-0.5)*2*255)-1)end cloud(-19,23)cloud(64-9,16)C(0,35,0)dCF(54,h+6,33)c(41)dCF(10,h-6,33)
cTemp(64/2-14,ch+ch/4-5) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch-34,rain,"rain",53,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch-34,fog,"fog",4,1) guage(64+(w-64)/2-38,ch+2,radi*0.01,"radi",41,2) guage(64+(w-64)/2+2,ch+2,wS*0.539957*0.01,"wind",54,3) end
function cTemp(x,y)v=dd(temp) if v>=30 or v<=5 then c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,28,11)end if v>=30 then c(11)dS(x,y,28,11) elseif v<=5 then c(53)dS(x,y,28,11)end c()dTB(x-18,y+3,64,5,v.."'C",0,0)end
function guage(x,y,v,t,co,ty)st=90 en=321 c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,38,33)c()dS(x,y,38,33) c(5,100)dS(x+2,y+18,23,9)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+20,y+17,14-j,0,360)end --shade c(2)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end--bar if ty>1 then--gauge c(co,v*255*5)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end else c(co)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0-st,en*v-90)end end c(4)dS(x+1,y+17,23,9)sv=dd(v*100)--banner if ty==1 then sv=sv.."%"end c()dTB(x+3,y+19,20,5,t,0,0)c(9) if ty==3 then if i==100 then xd=x-2 else xd=x end dTB(xd+14,y+7,15,5,sv,-1,0)kmh(x+17,y+13) if sv>=0.1 then dTX(x+28,y+26,TEXT)end else if i==100 then xd=x-1 else xd=x end dTB(xd+10,y+10,20,5,sv,0,0)end end
function kmh(x,y) dF(x,y,1,3)dF(x+1,y+1,1,1)d(x+2,y)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+4,y,3,2)dF(x+4,y,1,3)dF(x+6,y,1,3)dF(x+8,y,1,3)d(x+9,y+1)dF(x+10,y,1,3)end function cloud(xc,yc) if rain>=0.25 then C(100/cd,100/cd,100/cd)else c()end dF(xc+7,yc+11,17,7)dCF(xc+7,yc+13,4)dCF(xc+11,yc+7,5)dCF(xc+19,yc+9,5)dCF(xc+24,yc+14,3.5)end

fV=fog*54 if dd(fog*54)==0 then fV=0 elseif dd(fog*54)<3 then fV=3 end

c(0)dF(aa,8,w,h)cTemp(cw,ch/2-5)ch=ch-2
c(1)dS(cw-27,ch-4,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+6,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(53)dS(cw-27,ch-4,rV,9) c(2)dS(cw-27,ch+6,fV,9) c(41,rc)dS(cw-27,ch+16,54,9) c(54,wc)dS(cw-27,ch+26,54,9)
c(5) dTX(cw-24,ch-2,"Rain")dTB(cw-24,ch-2,46,5,dd(rain*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+8,"Fog")dTB(cw-24,ch+8,46,5,dd(fog*100,0).."%",1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+18,"Radi")dTB(cw-24,ch+18,46,5,dd(radi),1,0) dTX(cw-24,ch+28,"Wind")dTB(cw-24,ch+28,46,5,dd(wS*0.539957).."kmh",1,0)
end end

function onTick()W,H,X,Y,ap,a1,a2,ou,c30,c31,c32=gN(1,2,3,4,7,8,9,10,30,31,32)t=gB(1)
if c30>0 then OCS=c30 end
if c32>0 then if ou>1 and oup~=ou then table.insert(st[pg1],{OCS,k(ou)}) elseif ou==1 and oup~=ou then table.remove(st[pg1],#st[pg1]) end
if c31==1 then st[pg1]={} end if c31==2 then pg=pg-0.2 end if c31==3 then pg=pg+0.2 end pg=clamp(1,pg,9) pg1=dd(pg)
end

O31=0 pb=t and iR(W/2+9+AA,12,6,7) pn=t and iR(W/2+22+AA,12,6,7) if pb then O31=2 end if pn then O31=3 end
CLE=t and iR(W/2+28+AA,12,7,7) if CLE then O31=1 end
oN(30,CS) --0(none) 1-6 colour oN(31,O31) --clear page 0 NONE 1 CLE 2 PB 3 PN end

if di>30 then col(OCS)dTX(cw-29+aa+oo,25+yy,"_")end

c(2) if pb then dS(cw+9+aa,12,6,7)end if pn then dS(cw+22+aa,12,6,7)end c(4)dTX(cw+10+aa,13,"<")dTX(cw+16+aa,13,pg1)dTX(cw+23+aa,13,">")
if CLE then c(2)dS(cw+28+aa,12,7,7)end clear(cw+29+aa,13) end end

end

if bacB then ou=1 end if et then ou=2 end if onB then ou=3 end if twB then ou=4 end if thB then ou=5 end if foB then ou=6 end if fiB then ou=7 end if siB then ou=8 end if seB then ou=9 end if eiB then ou=10 end if niB then ou=11 end if zeB then ou=12 end if qB then ou=13 end if wB then ou=14 end if eB then ou=15 end if rB then ou=16 end if tB then ou=17 end if yB then ou=18 end if uB then ou=19 end if iB then ou=20 end if oB then ou=21 end if pB then ou=22 end if aB then ou=23 end if sB then ou=24 end if dB then ou=25 end if fB then ou=26 end if gB then ou=27 end if hB then ou=28 end if jB then ou=29 end if kB then ou=30 end if lB then ou=31 end if zB then ou=32 end if xB then ou=33 end if cB then ou=34 end if vB then ou=35 end if bB then ou=36 end if nB then ou=37 end if mB then ou=38 end if spaB then ou=39 end if comB then ou=40 end if fulB then ou=41 end --or et if bacB or onB or twB or twB or thB or foB or fiB or siB or seB or eiB or niB or zeB or qB or wB or eB or rB or tB or yB or uB or iB or oB or pB or aB or sB or dB or fB or gB or hB or jB or kB or lB or zB or xB or cB or bB or nB or mB or spaB or comB or fulB then tuu=true else tuu=false end O.setNumber(9,ou) if tuu and PC==1 then r=1 else r=0 end O.setNumber(10,r) end

q=q+1 elseif q==1 then X2=X Y2=Y q=0 tI(l,{t,X1,Y1,X2,Y2,-1,-1,R,G,B,A,""})re()end elseif t>=6 and t<=7 then if q==0 then X1=X Y1=Y q=q+1 elseif q==1 then X2=X Y2=Y q=q+1 elseif q==2 then X3=X Y3=Y pr and V then table.remove(l,#l)re()end cl=iP and iR(11,1,7,7)if cl then l={}pg=1 end end function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 sd=w*h==46080 b=1.8125 for i=1,#l do cp(4)ty(cw-34,2,1)ty(cw-16,2,2)ty(cw-7,2,3)ty(cw+2,2,4)ty(cw+11,2,5)ty(cw+19,2,6)ty(cw+28,2,7)ty(cw-25,2,8)ps(cl,3,0)dS(11,1,7,7)ps(pr,3,0)dS(19,1,7,7)ps(pu,3,2)dS(w-14,77,5,7)ps(pd,3,2)dS(w-8,77,5,7)if pg>9 then pgd="#"else pgd=pg end cp(4)dTx(w-21,78,pgd)lr=1+((pg-1)*7)ur=7+((pg-1)*7)a=0 for i=1,#l do if i>=lr and i<=ur then x,y=w-22,21+a cp(2)dS(x,y,19,7)cp(4)ty(x+2,y+1,l[i][1])if i>99 then id="~~"else id=i end dTx(x+8,y+1,id)a=a+8 end end if X1>0 and Y1>0 then dP(X1,Y1)if t==8 then C(GF(R,G,B,A))dTx(X1,Y1-2,TE)end end if X2>0 and Y2>0 then dP(X2,Y2)end if X3>0 and Y3>0 then dP(X3,Y3)end end end function ps(f,a,b)if f then cp(a)else cp(b)end end function dP(x,y)C(185,39,0)dC(x,y,5.7)dC(x,y,0.9)end function tr(x,y)d(x+2,y)dF(x+1,y+1,1,2)dF(x+3,y+1,1,2)dF(x,y+3,1,2)dF(x+4,y+3,1,2)dF(x,y+4,5,1)end function ty(x,y,t)if t==1 then dL(x,y+4,x+5,y-1)end if t==2 then dR(x,y,4,4)end if t==3 then dF(x,y,5,5)end if t==4 then dC(x+2,y+2,2.3)end if t==5 then dCF(x+2,y+2,2.5)end if t==6 then tr(x,y)end if t==7 then tr(x,y)dF(x+1,y+1,3,2)dF(x,y+3,5,2)end if t==8 then d(x+2,y)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+1,y+1,1,4)dF(x+3,y+1,1,4)end end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dT=S.drawTriangle dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTx=S.drawText I=input O=output oN=O.setNumber tI=table.insert tU=table.unpack T=true F=false function cp(s)C(243,243,243)if s==1 then C(125,125,125)end if s==2 then C(75,75,75)end if s==3 then C(45,45,45)end if s==4 then C(25,25,25)end end
function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function dS(x,y,w,h)dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end function gB(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getBool(c)end;return tU(a)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end
t=1
R=20 G=20 B=20 A=255
function onTick() W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)iP=gB(1)Q=W/2 cw=W/2 ch=H/2
if iP and iR(cw-35,1,7,7)then t=1 end if iP and iR(cw-26,1,7,7)then t=8 end if iP and iR(cw-17,1,7,7)then t=2 end if iP and iR(cw-8 ,1,7,7)then t=3 end if iP and iR(cw+1 ,1,7,7)then t=4 end if iP and iR(cw+10,1,7,7)then t=5 end if iP and iR(cw+18,1,7,7)then t=6 end if iP and iR(cw+27,1,7,7)then t=7 end
if iP and iR(2,20,4,63)then R=255-(Y-20)/63*255 end if iP and iR(7,20,4,63)then G=255-(Y-20)/63*255 end if iP and iR(12,20,4,63)then B=255-(Y-20)/63*255 end if iP and iR(17,20,4,63)then A=255-(Y-20)/63*255 end
oN(7,t) oN(8,R) oN(9,G) oN(10,B) oN(11,A)
end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 cp()dF(0,0,w,h) cp(1)dF(0,0,w,9)cp()dS(-1,0,10,9) end

M=math S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dT=S.drawTriangle dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTx=S.drawText dTxB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output oB=O.setBool tI=table.insert tU=table.unpack function cp(s)C(243,243,243) if s==1 then C(125,125,125)end if s==2 then C(75,75,75)end if s==3 then C(45,45,45)end if s==4 then C(25,25,25)end if s=="cy"then C(0,85,85)end if s=="c1"then C(0,50,50)end if s=="bk"then C(0,0,0)end end
function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function dS(x,y,w,h)dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function GF(r,g,b,a)r=r^2.2/255^2.2*r g=g^2.2/255^2.2*g b=b^2.2/255^2.2*b return r,g,b,a end R=0 G=0 B=0 A=0 TEXT="" TF=false function onTick() W,H,X,Y,t,R,G,B,A=gN(1,2,3,4,7,8,9,10,11)iP=I.getBool(1) oB(1,SP) end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 sd=w*h==15360
if sd then cp(3)dF(33,79,96,1)dF(128,16,1,64) else cp(3)dF(231,23,1,116)dF(58,138,174,1) end
if not sd then cp()dS(w-24,10,23,9)cp(2)dF(w-13,11,4,4)cp(4)dF(w-14,12,4,4)cp(2)dF(w-15,13,4,4)cp(4)dF(w-16,14,4,4)
cp()dS(1,10,21,9)
C(150,0,0)dF(2,20,4,62+1)GradV(2,20,4,62,0,255) C(0,50,0)dF(7,20,4,62+1)GradV(7,20,4,62,0,255) C(0,38,65)dF(12,20,4,62+1)GradV(12,20,4,62,0,255) cp()dF(17,20,4,62+1)bl(17,20,62)GradV(17,20,4,62,255,0) ga(2,R)ga(7,G)ga(12,B)ga(17,A)
C(GF(R,G,B,A))oc(8,11) else cp(4)dTx(11,2,"Display Only") end
cp(4)pe(2,2)
if not sd then cp(2)dF(12,2,4,4)cr(14,4) cp(4)pr(20,2)
cp(4) d(w-13,80)d(w-12,81)d(w-11,80) d(w-7,80)d(w-6,79)d(w-5,80) end
end function cr(x,y)C(250,0,0)dL(x,y,x+3,y+3)dL(x,y+2,x+3,y-1)end function pr(x,y)dF(x,y,1,3)dF(x+1,y+1,1,2)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+2,y,2,1)dF(x+4,y+1,1,3)d(x+3,y+4)end function pe(x,y)dF(x+3,y,2,2)dF(x+2,y+1,2,2)d(x+1,y+2)d(x+2,y+3)dF(x,y+3,1,2)d(x+1,y+4)end function oc(x,y)C(GF(R,G,B,A))dF(x,y+1,1,5)dF(x+1,y,1,5)d(x+2,y+1)cp(4)dF(x+3,y+1,2,4)dF(x+2,y+2,4,2)d(x+4,y+5)d(x+5,y+4)d(x+6,y+3)end function GradV(x,y,w,h,o1,o2)for i=0,h,1 do C(0,0,0,o1+i*((o2-o1)/h))dF(x,y+i,w,1)end end function bl(x,y,h)cp(2)for i=0,h,1 do if i%2==0 then d(x,y+i)d(x+2,y+i)else d(x+1,y+i)d(x+3,y+i)end end end function ga(x,v)cp()dF(x,20+(1-v/255)*63,4,1)end

microprocessor_definition.name: Flappy Bird
microprocessor_definition.description: The classic game now on Stormworks Lua!

node.label: monitor composite input
node.description: monitor composite touch input

node.label: video output
node.description: this plugs into a monitor

object.script:
--background block mv = false show = false p=0 c=0 a=0 b=0 reset=false function onTick() mv = input.getBool(32) show = input.getBool(31) reset=input.getBool(23) if reset then p=0 c=0 a=0 b=0 end if mv then if c > 2 then c=0 p=p+1 a=a+1 b=b+1 if p > 160 then p = 0 end if a > 200 then a = 0 end if b > 90 then b = 0 end else c = c + 1 end end end
function onDraw() w = screen.getWidth() h = screen.getHeight() if show then screen.setColor(25,50,255) screen.drawRectF(0,0,w,2*(h/3)) screen.setColor(194,178,128) screen.drawRectF(0,(2*(h/3)),w,h/3) screen.setColor(50,255,30) if w < 65 then screen.drawRectF(0,2*(h/3)+1,w, 4) else screen.drawRectF(0,2*(h/3),w, 4) end
l=b/3 for t=-5,5 do screen.setColor(100,100,100) screen.drawCircleF(w-2-l+(t*30),21,3) screen.drawCircleF(w-8-l+(t*30),20,6) screen.drawCircleF(w-14-l+(t*30),21,3) end
screen.setColor(25,105,15) for i=-20,20 do screen.drawLine(w-1-p+(i*8),2*(h/3),w-4-p+(i*8),(2*(h/3))+4) screen.drawLine(w-2-p+(i*8),2*(h/3),w-5-p+(i*8),(2*(h/3))+4) screen.drawLine(w-3-p+(i*8),2*(h/3),w-6-p+(i*8),(2*(h/3))+4) screen.drawLine(w-4-p+(i*8),2*(h/3),w-7-p+(i*8),(2*(h/3))+4) end
k = a/2 for i=-10,10 do screen.setColor(25,30,35) screen.drawRectF(w-10-k+(i*50),2*(h/3),10,-15) screen.drawRectF(w-24-k+(i*50),2*(h/3),12,-26) screen.drawRectF(w-36-k+(i*50),2*(h/3),10,-15)
screen.setColor(80,80,80) screen.drawRectF(w-8-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-3-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-8-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-3-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4)
screen.drawRectF(w-22-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-15-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-22-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-15-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-22-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-20,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-15-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-20,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-22-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-14,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-15-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-14,2,-4)
screen.drawRectF(w-34-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-29-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-2,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-34-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4) screen.drawRectF(w-29-k+(i*50),2*(h/3)-8,2,-4) end end --screen.setColor(0,0,0) --screen.drawText(1,1,"p = " .. p) --screen.drawText(1,8,"a = " .. a) --screen.drawText(1,15,"b = " .. b) end

game=false rn=0 pipeScore=0 pb=false firstRun=true mvp=false dd=false mb=false mbb=false f=0 hs=0 savedata=false bs=false t=5 function onTick() if f < 10 then f=f+1 end isPressed = input.getBool(1) pipeScore=input.getNumber(13) hs=input.getNumber(14) pb=input.getBool(24) bs=input.getBool(21) if game then output.setBool(32,mb)--mv bkg output.setBool(31,true)--show bkg output.setBool(30,mvp)--move pipes output.setBool(29,true)--draw pipes output.setBool(28,mbb) output.setBool(27,true) else output.setBool(32,false)--mv bkg output.setBool(31,true)--show bkg output.setBool(30,false)--move pipes output.setBool(29,false)--draw pipes output.setBool(28,false) output.setBool(27,false) end output.setNumber(8,input.getNumber(8)) output.setBool(25, isPressed) rn = input.getNumber(8) output.setNumber(8,rn) output.setNumber(11,input.getNumber(11)) if isPressed and firstRun then game = true firstRun = false mvp=true mb=true mbb=true end if pb and f > 9 then dd=true end
if dd then--dead mvp=false mb=false mbb=false if pipeScore > hs then savedata = true end if t > -1 then t = t - 1 end end
if dd and isPressed and t < 0 then savedata=false dd=false output.setBool(23,true) mvp=true mb=true mbb=true f=0 pb=false pipeScore=0 t=5 else output.setBool(23,false) end output.setBool(22,savedata) output.setNumber(14,pipeScore) end
function onDraw() w = screen.getWidth() h = screen.getHeight() if not game or dd then if bs then screen.setColor(255,255,255) screen.drawText((w/2)-32,(h/2)-24,"touch to start") end end if dd then screen.setColor(150,150,150) screen.drawRectF((w/2)-28,(h/2)-15,56,30) screen.setColor(200,0,0) screen.drawText((w/2)-26,(h/2)-13,"game over") screen.setColor(0,0,0) screen.drawText((w/2)-26,(h/2)-7,"your score:") screen.drawText((w/2)-26,(h/2)+1,math.floor(pipeScore)) if pipeScore > hs or savedata then if bs then screen.setColor(255,0,255) screen.drawText((w/2)-26,(h/2)+9,"high score") end end end screen.setColor(255,255,255) screen.drawText(2,2,"Score: " .. math.floor(pipeScore)) screen.drawText(2,9,"HI SCORE: " .. math.floor(hs)) if pb then --screen.drawText(2,9,"boop=true") else --screen.drawText(2,9,"boop=false") end end

--bird drawing block mv=false sh=false dx = 20 dy = 0 a=0 c=0 l=0 ct = 10 jump=false jp=false ff=false b=0 reset=false function onTick() reset = input.getBool(23) mv = input.getBool(28) sh = input.getBool(27) jump = input.getBool(25) if reset then dx = 20 dy = 0 a=0 c=0 l=0 ct = 10 jump=false jp=false ff=false b=0 end if jump then jp = true b=0 ct=10 end if mv then if c>2 then c=0 if not jp and b < 3 then a=a+1 b=b+1 elseif not jp and b >= 3 then a=a+2 b=b+1 else ct=ct-1 if ct > 6 then a=a-3 elseif ct > 3 then a=a-2 else a=a-1 end if ct == 0 then jp = false ct = 10 end end else c=c+1 end end output.setNumber(11, dy+a) end
function onDraw() w = screen.getWidth() h = screen.getHeight() dy = h/2
db(dx,dy + a) end
function sl(x1,y1,x2,y2) screen.drawLine(x1,y1,x2,y2) end
function db(px,py) screen.setColor(255,255,255) sl(px+8,py+1,px+8,py+4) sl(px+9,py+1,px+9,py+4) sl(px+10,py+2,px+10,py+4) sl(px+1,py+4,px+4,py+4) sl(px+1,py+5,px+4,py+5) screen.setColor(0,0,0) sl(px+7,py,px+8,py) sl(px+8,py,px+9,py) sl(px+9,py,px+10,py) sl(px+4,py+1,px+5,py+1) sl(px+5,py+1,px+6,py+1) sl(px+6,py+1,px+7,py+1) sl(px+7,py+1,px+8,py+1) sl(px+10,py+1,px+11,py+1) sl(px+3,py+2,px+5,py+2) sl(px+7,py+2,px+8,py+2) sl(px+11,py+2,px+12,py+2) sl(px+9,py+2,px+10,py+2) sl(px+1,py+3,px+4,py+3) sl(px+7,py+3,px+8,py+3) sl(px+11,py+3,px+12,py+3) sl(px+0,py+4,px+0,py+7) sl(px+4,py+4,px+6,py+4) sl(px+8,py+4,px+14,py+4) sl(px+5,py+5,px+6,py+5) sl(px+9,py+5,px+9,py+9) sl(px+13,py+5,px+13,py+8) sl(px+4,py+6,px+6,py+6) sl(px+11,py+6,px+14,py+6) sl(px+1,py+7,px+5,py+7) sl(px+2,py+8,px+3,py+8) sl(px+10,py+8,px+13,py+8) sl(px+3,py+9,px+9,py+9) screen.setColor(225,20,20) sl(px+10,py+5,px+13,py+5) sl(px+10,py+6,px+11,py+6) sl(px+10,py+7,px+13,py+7) screen.setColor(255,255,0) sl(px+5,py+2,px+7,py+2) sl(px+4,py+3,px+7,py+3) sl(px+6,py+4,px+8,py+4) sl(px+6,py+5,px+9,py+5) sl(px+4,py+5,px+5,py+5) sl(px+1,py+6,px+4,py+6) sl(px+6,py+6,px+9,py+6) screen.setColor(150,75,0) sl(px+5,py+7,px+9,py+7) sl(px+3,py+8,px+9,py+8) end

--pipe drawing block p1loc=0 p2loc=0 p1h=0 p2h=0 p3h=0 mv=false sh=false c=0 a=0 b=-50 d=-100 w=0 rn=0 boop=false bh=0 h=0 inPipe=false pts=-1 a2s=false reset=false function onTick() mv = input.getBool(30) sh = input.getBool(29) rn=input.getNumber(8) bh=input.getNumber(11) reset=input.getBool(23) if reset then p1loc=0 p2loc=0 p1h=0 p2h=0 p3h=0 mv=false sh=false c=0 a=0 b=-50 d=-100 w=0 rn=0 boop=false bh=0 h=0 inPipe=false pts=-1 a2s=false end if mv then if c > 2 then c=0 a=a+1 b=b+1 d=d+1 else c=c+1 end if a > 160 then a=0 p1h=(rn*8) end if b > 160 then b=0 p2h=(rn*8) end if d > 160 then d=0 p3h=(rn*8) end end g1=w+(a*-1) > 32 and w+(a*-1) < 51 g2=w+(b*-1) > 32 and w+(b*-1) < 51 g3=w+(d*-1) > 32 and w+(d*-1) < 51 t1=(bh < (2*(h/3))-40+p1h or bh+7 > (2*(h/3))+p1h) t2=(bh < (2*(h/3))-40+p2h or bh+7 > (2*(h/3))+p2h) t3=(bh < (2*(h/3))-40+p3h or bh+7 > (2*(h/3))+p3h) if g1 and t1 then boop=true elseif g2 and t2 then boop=true elseif g3 and t3 then boop=true else boop=false end
if (g1 or g2 or g3) and not a2s then a2s=true end if not g1 and not g2 and not g3 and a2s then a2s=false pts=pts+1 end output.setBool(24,boop) output.setNumber(13,pts) end
function onDraw() w = screen.getWidth() h = screen.getHeight()
if sh then dp(a*-1, p1h) dp((b*-1), p2h) dp((d*-1), p3h) end --screen.drawText(1,1,"pp " .. w+(a*-1)) --screen.drawText(1,8,"rn" .. rn) end
function dp(x,y) screen.setColor(20,200,20) screen.drawRectF(w-20+x,(2*(h/3))+y,10,60) screen.drawRectF(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))+y,12,6) screen.setColor(70,255,70) dl(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-21+x,(2*(h/3))+6+y) dl(w-20+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-20+x,h) screen.setColor(40,250,40) dl(w-19+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-19+x,h) dl(w-18+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-18+x,h) dl(w-16+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-16+x,h) screen.setColor(15,170,15) dl(w-14+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-14+x,h) screen.setColor(10,150,10) dl(w-12+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-12+x,h) dl(w-11+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-11+x,h) dl(w-10+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-10+x,(2*(h/3))+6+y) screen.setColor(0,0,0) dl(w-10+x,(2*(h/3))+y+6,w-10+x,h) dl(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))+y+6,w-21+x,h) dl(w-9+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-9+x,(2*(h/3))+7+y) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))+y,w-22+x,(2*(h/3))+7+y) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))-1+y,w-8+x,(2*(h/3))-1+y) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))+6+y,w-8+x,(2*(h/3))+6+y)
screen.setColor(20,200,20) screen.drawRectF(w-20+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y, 10, -60) screen.drawRectF(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))-39+y, 12, -6) screen.setColor(70,255,70) dl(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-21+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y) dl(w-20+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-20+x,-1) screen.setColor(40,250,40) dl(w-19+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-19+x,-1) dl(w-18+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-18+x,-1) dl(w-16+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-16+x,-1) screen.setColor(15,170,15) dl(w-14+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-14+x,-1) screen.setColor(10,150,10) dl(w-12+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-12+x,-1) dl(w-11+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-11+x,-1) dl(w-10+x,(2*(h/3))-40+y,w-10+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y) screen.setColor(0,0,0) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))-39+y,w-8+x,(2*(h/3))-39+y) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))-39+y,w-22+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y) dl(w-9+x,(2*(h/3))-39+y,w-9+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y) dl(w-22+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y,w-8+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y) dl(w-21+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y,w-21+x,-1) dl(w-10+x,(2*(h/3))-46+y,w-10+x,-1) end
function dl(x1,y1,x2,y2) screen.drawLine(x1,y1,x2,y2) end
