object.script:
M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input tU=table.unpack P=property Pn=P.getNumber Pt=P.getText function c(s,a)a=a or 255 --0 bw w1,g1,g2,--,g3,g4,bk r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end --1red r if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end if s==12 then r,g,b=50,0,0 end --2orange o,o1 if s==21 then r,g,b=185,39,0 end --3 yellow y,y1 if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end --4 green g if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end --5cyan-blue cya,be,be1,be2 if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end --6magenta m if s==61 then r,g,b=255,0,255 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function dArc(...)local a,b,c,d,e,f,g=...d=d or 0;e=e or 360;g=g or 22.5;if e<d then e,d=d,e end;local h,i,j,k,l,m=false,0,0,0,0,0;repeat h=h and M.min(h+g,e)or d;m=(h-90)*pi/180;i,j=a+c*co(m),b+c*si(m)if h~=d then if f then dTF(a,b,k,l,i,j)else dL(k,l,i,j)end end;k,l=i,j until h>=e end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end
function onTick() W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)t=I.getBool(1)CW=W/2 CH=H/2 V1,V2,V3,V4,V5,V6=gN(11,12,13,14,15,16) B1=I.getBool(11) B2=I.getBool(12) end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 c(2)dF(0,0,w,h)
guage(cw-73,ch-35,V1,Pt("V1Name"),Pn("V1c"),Pn("V1")) guage(cw-33,ch-35,V2,Pt("V2Name"),Pn("V2c"),Pn("V2")) guage(cw+7,ch-35,V3,Pt("V3Name"),Pn("V3c"),Pn("V3")) guage(cw-73,ch,V4,Pt("V4Name"),Pn("V4c"),Pn("V4")) guage(cw-33,ch,V5,Pt("V5Name"),Pn("V5c"),Pn("V5")) guage(cw+7,ch,V6,Pt("V6Name"),Pn("V6c"),Pn("V6")) but(cw+47,ch-35,B1,Pt("B1Name"),P.getBool("Button1")) but(cw+47,ch,B2,Pt("B2Name"),P.getBool("Button2")) end
function guage(x,y,v,t,co,ty)st=90 en=321 c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,38,33)c()dS(x,y,38,33) c(5,100)dS(x+2,y+18,23,9)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+20,y+17,14-j,0,360)end --shade c(2)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end--bar if ty>1 then--gauge c(co,v*255*5)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0,360)end else c(co)for j=0,1.8,0.3 do dArc(x+19,y+16,14-j,0-st,en*v-90)end end c(4)dS(x+1,y+17,23,9)--banner if ty==1 then sv=dd(v*100) else sv=dd(v) end if ty==1 then sv=sv.."%"end c()dTB(x+3,y+19,20,5,t,0,0)c(9) if ty==3 then else if i==100 then xd=x-1 else xd=x end dTB(xd+10,y+10,20,5,sv,0,0)end end
function but(x,y,s,t,pu) c(5,100)dS(x+1,y+1,25,33)c()dS(x,y,25,33) if s then c(51)else c(4)end dS(x+1,y+1,23,9)c()dTB(x+1,y+1,23,9,t,0,0) ic(x+6,y+15,s,pu) end
function ic(x,y,s,pu) c(31)dCF(x+6.5,y+7.5,7.5) c(12)dCF(x+6.5,y+7.5,6.5) c(11)aa=0 if s then aa=1 end dCF(x+6.5,y+5.5+aa,6.5) c()dF(x+5,y+1+aa,2,1)d(x+4,y+2+aa)d(x+3,y+3+aa) if pu then TE="T"else TE="P" end dTX(x+5,y+4+aa,TE) end

M=math si=M.sin co=M.cos pi=M.pi pi2=pi*2 S=screen C=S.setColor dL=S.drawLine dC=S.drawCircle dCF=S.drawCircleF dR=S.drawRect dF=S.drawRectF dTF=S.drawTriangleF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox SS=string.sub TN=tonumber I=input O=output oN=O.setNumber oB=O.setBool tU=table.unpack P=property Pn=P.getNumber Pt=P.getText function c(s,a)a=a or 255 r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end if s==12 then r,g,b=50,0,0 end if s==31 then r,g,b=125,125,0 end if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end C(r,g,b,cl(0,a,255))end function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end function cl(a,b,c)return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH)return X>rX-1 and Y>rY-1 and X<rX-1+rW+1 and Y<rY-1+rH+1 end
V1=0 V2=0 V3=0 V4=0 V5=0 V6=0
B1=false bu1=false B2=false bu2=false
b1t=P.getBool("Button1") b2t=P.getBool("Button2") se=Pn("Sensitivity")*0.002
function onTick() W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)t=I.getBool(1)CW=W/2 CH=H/2
r1=t and iR(CW-71,CH-33,5,5)if r1 then V1=0 end p1=t and iR(CW-42,CH-33,5,5)if p1 then V1=V1+se end m1=t and iR(CW-42,CH-9,5,5)if m1 then V1=V1-se end r2=t and iR(CW-31,CH-33,5,5)if r2 then V2=0 end p2=t and iR(CW-2,CH-33,5,5)if p2 then V2=V2+se end m2=t and iR(CW-2,CH-9,5,5)if m2 then V2=V2-se end r3=t and iR(CW+9,CH-33,5,5)if r3 then V3=0 end p3=t and iR(CW+38,CH-33,5,5)if p3 then V3=V3+se end m3=t and iR(CW+38,CH-9,5,5)if m3 then V3=V3-se end r4=t and iR(CW-71,CH+2,5,5)if r4 then V4=0 end p4=t and iR(CW-42,CH+2,5,5)if p4 then V4=V4+se end m4=t and iR(CW-42,CH+26,5,5)if m4 then V4=V4-se end r5=t and iR(CW-31,CH+2,5,5)if r5 then V5=0 end p5=t and iR(CW-2,CH+2,5,5)if p5 then V5=V5+se end m5=t and iR(CW-2,CH+26,5,5)if m5 then V5=V5-se end r6=t and iR(CW+9,CH+2,5,5)if r6 then V6=0 end p6=t and iR(CW+38,CH+2,5,5)if p6 then V6=V6+se end m6=t and iR(CW+38,CH+26,5,5)if m6 then V6=V6-se end
if Pn("V1")==1 then V1=cl(0,V1,1)V1o=V1 else V1o=dd(V1*100)end if Pn("V2")==1 then V2=cl(0,V2,1)V2o=V2 else V2o=dd(V2*100)end if Pn("V3")==1 then V3=cl(0,V3,1)V3o=V3 else V3o=dd(V3*100)end if Pn("V4")==1 then V4=cl(0,V4,1)V4o=V4 else V4o=dd(V4*100)end if Pn("V5")==1 then V5=cl(0,V5,1)V5o=V5 else V5o=dd(V5*100)end if Pn("V6")==1 then V6=cl(0,V6,1)V6o=V6 else V6o=dd(V6*100)end
bu1=t and iR(CW+47,CH-35,25,33) bu2=t and iR(CW+47,CH,25,33)
if b1t then if bu1 and B1 and bu1p~=bu1 then B1=false elseif bu1 and not B1 and bu1p~=bu1 then B1=true end else if bu1 then B1=true end end
if b2t then if bu2 and B2 and bu2p~=bu2 then B2=false elseif bu2 and not B2 and bu2p~=bu2 then B2=true end else if bu2 then B2=true end end
oB(1,B1) oB(2,B2)
oN(1,V1o) oN(2,V2o) oN(3,V3o) oN(4,V4o) oN(5,V5o) oN(6,V6o)
if not b1t then B1=false end
if not b2t then B2=false end
bu1p=bu1 bu2p=bu2 end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 c(1)dF(0,0,w,9)c()dS(-1,0,10,9)pa(2,2)c(5)dTB(0,0,w,9,Pt("NameOfControllingDevice"),0,0) re(cw-71,ch-33,r1)pl(cw-42,ch-33,p1)mi(cw-42,ch-9,m1) re(cw-31,ch-33,r2)pl(cw-2,ch-33,p2)mi(cw-2,ch-9,m2) re(cw+9,ch-33,r3)pl(cw+38,ch-33,p3)mi(cw+38,ch-9,m3) re(cw-71,ch+2,r4)pl(cw-42,ch+2,p4)mi(cw-42,ch+26,m4) re(cw-31,ch+2,r5)pl(cw-2,ch+2,p5)mi(cw-2,ch+26,m5) re(cw+9,ch+2,r6)pl(cw+38,ch+2,p6)mi(cw+38,ch+26,m6) end
function pl(x,y,s)if s then c(51) else c(4)end dS(x,y,5,5)c()dS(x+1,y+1,3,3)end function mi(x,y,s)if s then c(51) else c(4)end dS(x,y,5,5)c()dF(x+1,y+2,3,1)end function re(x,y,s)if s then c(51) else c(4)end dF(x,y,1,3)dF(x+1,y+1,1,2)d(x+2,y+2)dF(x+2,y,2,1)dF(x+4,y+1,1,3)dF(x+2,y+4,2,1)end function pa(x,y)c(4)dF(x,y,5,5)c(2)dF(x+3,y,2,1)c()d(x+1,y+1)d(x+2,y+2)d(x+1,y+3)end
